---
title: "Plots_BA"
output: html_document
date: "2026-04-16"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```
```{r Daten laden}
#Daten laden 
datagruem <- read.table(file = "C:/Users/maggi/OneDrive/Studium/7_Semster/BA/Dat/EZG_poschiavino/alpe_gruem_wet_dat/Alp_gruem_wet_dat.csv" , header = TRUE, sep =";", dec = ".")
datacavaglia <- read.table(file = "C:/Users/maggi/OneDrive/Studium/7_Semster/BA/Dat/EZG_poschiavino/cavaglia_wet_dat/Cavaglia_wet_dat_vollstaendig.csv" , header = TRUE, sep =";", dec = ".")
datarobbia <-read.table(file = "C:/Users/maggi/OneDrive/Studium/7_Semster/BA/Dat/EZG_poschiavino/robbia_wet_dat_aut/ogd-smn_rob_d_historical.csv", header = TRUE, sep =";", dec = ".")
dataQleprese <- read.table(file = "C:/Users/maggi/OneDrive/Studium/7_Semster/BA/Dat/EZG_poschiavino/le_prese_abf_dat/17449_5191_2026-03-17_10-47-30/0078_Abfluss_Tagesmittel_1959-01-01_2025-12-31.csv", header = TRUE, sep = ";", dec = ".", fileEncoding = "latin1")
dataQLech <- read.table(file = "C:/Users/maggi/OneDrive/Studium/7_Semster/BA/Dat/EZG_Lech/Q-Tagesmittel-200378.csv", header = TRUE , sep =";" , dec= ".", fileEncoding = "latin1")
dataQGschnitzbach <- read.table(file = "C:/Users/maggi/OneDrive/Studium/7_Semster/BA/Dat/EZG_Gschnitzbach/Q-Tagesmittel-201566.csv", header = TRUE, sep = ";", dec = ".", fileEncoding = "latin1")
datazug <- read.table(file = "C:/Users/maggi/OneDrive/Studium/7_Semster/BA/Dat/EZG_Lech/SH-Tageswerte-100966.csv", header = TRUE, sep = ";", dec = ".", fileEncoding = "latin1")
datazuers <- read.table(file = "C:/Users/maggi/OneDrive/Studium/7_Semster/BA/Dat/EZG_Lech/SH-Tageswerte-101113.csv", header = TRUE, sep = ";", dec = ".", fileEncoding = "latin1")
datalech <- read.table(file = "C:/Users/maggi/OneDrive/Studium/7_Semster/BA/Dat/EZG_Lech/SH-Tageswerte-101121.csv", header = TRUE, sep = ";", dec = ".", fileEncoding = "latin1")
datatrins <- read.table(file = "C:/Users/maggi/OneDrive/Studium/7_Semster/BA/Dat/EZG_Gschnitzbach/SH-Tageswerte-102368.csv", header = TRUE, sep = ";", dec = ".", fileEncoding = "latin1")
datagschnitz <- read.table(file ="C:/Users/maggi/OneDrive/Studium/7_Semster/BA/Dat/EZG_Gschnitzbach/SH-Tageswerte-119412.csv", header = TRUE, sep = ";", dec = ".", fileEncoding = "latin1")

summary(datagruem)
head(datagruem)
names(datagruem)
summary(datacavaglia)
head(datacavaglia)
names(datacavaglia)
summary(datarobbia)
head(datarobbia)
names(datarobbia)
summary(dataQleprese)
head(dataQleprese)
names(dataQleprese)
summary(dataQLech)
head(dataQLech)
names(dataQLech)
summary(dataQGschnitzbach)
head(dataQGschnitzbach)
names(dataQGschnitzbach)
summary(datazug)
head(datazug)
names(datazug)
summary(datazuers)
head(datazuers)
names(datazuers)
summary(datalech)
head(datalech)
names(datalech)
summary(datatrins)
head(datatrins)
names(datatrins)
summary(datagschnitz)
head(datagschnitz)
names(datagschnitz)


options(scipen = 999)
```

```{r Daten vorbereiten}
#Daten vorbereiten 

library(zoo)

datacavaglia$date <- as.POSIXct(datacavaglia$measure_date, format = "%d.%m.%Y %H:%M")
datacavaglia$date <-as.Date(datacavaglia$date)
datacavaglia$hs <- c(datacavaglia$Hs_m)
datacavaglia$hs <- as.numeric(datacavaglia$hs)
full_dates_cav <- data.frame(date = seq(min(datacavaglia$date),max(datacavaglia$date),by = "day"))
datacavaglia <- merge(full_dates_cav, datacavaglia, by = "date", all.x = TRUE)
datacavaglia$monat <- format(datacavaglia$date, "%m")
datacavaglia$hs[is.na(datacavaglia$hs) & datacavaglia$monat %in% c("06","07","08","09")] <- 0
datacavaglia$hs[is.na(datacavaglia$hs)] <- 0



datagruem$date <- as.POSIXct(datagruem$measure_date, format = "%d.%m.%Y %H:%M")
datagruem$date <-as.Date(datagruem$date)
datagruem$hs <- c(datagruem$Hs_m)
datagruem$hs <- as.numeric(datagruem$hs)
full_dates_gruem <- data.frame(date = seq(min(datagruem$date),max(datagruem$date),by = "day"))
datagruem <- merge(full_dates_gruem, datagruem, by = "date", all.x = TRUE)
datagruem$monat <- format(datagruem$date, "%m")
datagruem$hs[is.na(datagruem$hs) & datagruem$monat %in% c("06","07","08","09")] <- 0
datagruem$hs[is.na(datagruem$hs)] <- 0




datarobbia$date <- as.POSIXct(datarobbia$reference_timestamp, format = "%d.%m.%Y")
datarobbia$date <- as.Date (datarobbia$date)
datarobbia$hs <- c(datarobbia$schnee_man_m)
datarobbia$hs <- as.numeric(datarobbia$hs)
full_dates_rob <- data.frame(date = seq(min(datarobbia$date),max(datarobbia$date),by = "day"))
datarobbia <- merge(full_dates_rob, datarobbia, by = "date", all.x = TRUE)
datarobbia$monat <- format(datarobbia$date, "%m")
datarobbia$hs[is.na(datarobbia$hs) & datarobbia$monat %in% c("06","07","08","09")] <- 0
datarobbia$hs[is.na(datarobbia$hs)] <- 0


datalech$date <- as.POSIXct(datalech$Werte_Lech., format = "%d.%m.%Y")
datalech$date <-as.Date(datalech$date)
datalech$hs <- c(datalech$HS_m)
datalech$hs <- as.numeric(datalech$hs)
full_dates_lech <- data.frame(date = seq(min(datalech$date),max(datalech$date),by = "day"))
datalech <- merge(full_dates_lech, datalech, by = "date", all.x = TRUE)
datalech$monat <- format(datalech$date, "%m")
datalech$hs[is.na(datalech$hs) & datalech$monat %in% c("06","07","08","09")] <- 0
datalech$hs[is.na(datalech$hs)] <- 0


datazuers$date <- as.POSIXct(datazuers$Werte_Zuers., format = "%d.%m.%Y")
datazuers$date <-as.Date(datazuers$date)
datazuers$hs <- c(datazuers$HS_m)
datazuers$hs <- as.numeric(datazuers$hs)
full_dates_zuers <- data.frame(date = seq(min(datazuers$date),max(datazuers$date),by = "day"))
datazuers <- merge(full_dates_zuers, datazuers, by = "date", all.x = TRUE)
datazuers$monat <- format(datazuers$date, "%m")
datazuers$hs[is.na(datazuers$hs) & datazuers$monat %in% c("06","07","08","09")] <- 0
datazuers$hs[is.na(datazuers$hs)] <- 0


datazug$date <- as.POSIXct(datazug$Werte_Zug., format = "%d.%m.%Y")
datazug$date <-as.Date(datazug$date)
datazug$hs <- c(datazug$HS_m)
datazug$hs <- as.numeric(datazug$hs)
full_dates_zug <- data.frame(date = seq(min(datazug$date),max(datazug$date),by = "day"))
datazug <- merge(full_dates_zug, datazug, by = "date", all.x = TRUE)
datazug$monat <- format(datazug$date, "%m")
datazug$hs[is.na(datazug$hs) & datazug$monat %in% c("06","07","08","09")] <- 0
datazug$hs[is.na(datazug$hs)] <- 0


datatrins$date <- as.POSIXct(datatrins$Werte_Trins., format = "%d.%m.%Y")
datatrins$date <-as.Date(datatrins$date)
datatrins$hs <- c(datatrins$HS_m)
datatrins$hs <- as.numeric(datatrins$hs)
full_dates_trins <- data.frame(date = seq(min(datatrins$date),max(datatrins$date),by = "day"))
datatrins <- merge(full_dates_trins, datatrins, by = "date", all.x = TRUE)
datatrins$monat <- format(datatrins$date, "%m")
datatrins$hs[is.na(datatrins$hs) & datatrins$monat %in% c("06","07","08","09")] <- 0
datatrins$hs[is.na(datatrins$hs)] <- 0


datagschnitz$date <- as.POSIXct(datagschnitz$Werte_Gschnitz., format = "%d.%m.%Y")
datagschnitz$date <-as.Date(datagschnitz$date)
datagschnitz$hs <- c(datagschnitz$HS_m)
datagschnitz$hs <- as.numeric(datagschnitz$hs)
full_dates_gsch <- data.frame(date = seq(min(datagschnitz$date),max(datagschnitz$date),by = "day"))
datagschnitz <- merge(full_dates_gsch, datagschnitz, by = "date", all.x = TRUE)
datagschnitz$monat <- format(datagschnitz$date, "%m")
datagschnitz$hs[is.na(datagschnitz$hs) & datagschnitz$monat %in% c("06","07","08","09")] <- 0
datagschnitz$hs[is.na(datagschnitz$hs)] <- 0


dataQleprese$Abfluss <- as.numeric(dataQleprese$Wert)
dataQleprese$date <-as.Date(dataQleprese$Zeitstempel, format = "%d.%m.%Y")
dataQLech$Abfluss <- as.numeric(dataQLech$X)
dataQLech$date <-as.Date(dataQLech$Werte., format = "%d.%m.%Y")
dataQGschnitzbach$Abfluss <- as.numeric(dataQGschnitzbach$X)
dataQGschnitzbach$date <-as.Date(dataQGschnitzbach$Werte., format = "%d.%m.%Y")


```

```{r Graphische Darstellung des Abflusses}
#Graphische Darstellungen des Abflusses

  #Abfluss fÃ¼r den gesamten Zeitraum
 
    #Poschiavino

library(ggplot2)
library(scales)  

options(repr.plot.width = 100, repr.plot.height = 6) 

    
plot_Qleprese_ges <- ggplot(dataQleprese, aes(x = date , y = Abfluss ))+
  geom_line(color = "steelblue", linewidth = 0.7) +
  scale_x_date(date_breaks = "10 years",            
               date_labels = "%Y") +
  xlab("Zeit") +
  ylab("Abfluss [mÂ³/s]") +
  labs(title = "Abfluss des Poschiavino") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +                 
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold")
  )
  
ggsave("C:/Users/maggi/OneDrive/Studium/7_Semster/BA/Dat/Plots/Q_leprese_ges.png",plot = plot_Qleprese_ges, width = 8, height = 5, dpi = 300, bg= "white")

    #Lech

options(repr.plot.width = 100, repr.plot.height = 6) 


    
plot_Qlech_ges <- ggplot(dataQLech, aes(x = date , y = Abfluss ))+
  geom_line(color = "steelblue", linewidth = 0.7) +
  scale_x_date(date_breaks = "10 years",            
               date_labels = "%Y") +
  xlab("Zeit") +
  ylab("Abfluss [mÂ³/s]") +
  labs(title = "Abfluss des Lechs") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +                 
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold")
  )
  
ggsave("C:/Users/maggi/OneDrive/Studium/7_Semster/BA/Dat/Plots/Q_lech_ges.png", plot = plot_Qlech_ges, width = 8, height = 5, dpi = 300, bg = "white")


    #Gschnitzbach

options(repr.plot.width = 100, repr.plot.height = 6) 

    
plot_Qgsch_ges <- ggplot(dataQGschnitzbach, aes(x = date , y = Abfluss ))+
  geom_line(color = "steelblue", linewidth = 0.7) +
  scale_x_date(date_breaks = "10 years",            
               date_labels = "%Y") +
  xlab("Zeit") +
  ylab("Abfluss [mÂ³/s]") +
  labs(title = "Abfluss des Gschnitzbachs") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +                 
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold")
  )

ggsave("C:/Users/maggi/OneDrive/Studium/7_Semster/BA/Dat/Plots/Q_gsch_ges.png", plot = plot_Qgsch_ges, width = 8, height = 5, dpi = 300, bg = "white")

  # Plot des Abflusses aufgeschlÃ¼sselt nach Jahren (Beispiel auf alle anderen Anwendbar)

    #Poschiavino
      #FÃ¼r Beobachtungszeitraum 
library(scales)

options(repr.plot.width = 100, repr.plot.height = 6) 
plot_Qleprese_sub <- ggplot(dataQleprese[dataQleprese$date >= as.Date("1992-01-01") & dataQleprese$date <= as.Date("2022-08-31"),],
       aes(x = date, y = Abfluss)) +
  geom_line(color = "steelblue", linewidth= 0.7) +
  geom_smooth(colour="red")+
  scale_x_date(date_breaks = "5 year", date_labels = "%Y") +
  xlab("Zeit") +
  ylab("Abfluss [mÂ³/s]") +
  labs(title = "Abfluss des Poschiavino (1992-2022)") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold")
  )

 
ggsave("C:/Users/maggi/OneDrive/Studium/7_Semster/BA/Dat/Plots/Q_leprese_sub.png", plot = plot_Qleprese_sub, width = 8, height = 5, dpi = 300, bg = "white")

#Lech

options(repr.plot.width = 100, repr.plot.height = 6) 
plot_Qlech_sub <- ggplot(dataQLech[dataQLech$date >= as.Date("1992-01-01") & dataQLech$date <= as.Date("2022-08-31"),],
       aes(x = date, y = Abfluss)) +
  geom_line(color = "steelblue", linewidth= 0.7) +
  geom_smooth(colour="red")+
  scale_x_date(date_breaks = "5 year", date_labels = "%Y") +
  xlab("Zeit") +
  ylab("Abfluss [mÂ³/s]") +
  labs(title = "Abfluss des Lechs (1992-2022)") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold")
  )

 
ggsave("C:/Users/maggi/OneDrive/Studium/7_Semster/BA/Dat/Plots/Q_lech_sub.png", plot = plot_Qlech_sub, width = 8, height = 5, dpi = 300, bg = "white")

options(repr.plot.width = 100, repr.plot.height = 6) 
plot_Qlech_1996 <- ggplot(dataQLech[dataQLech$date >= as.Date("1992-01-01") & dataQLech$date <= as.Date("1996-08-31"),],
       aes(x = date, y = Abfluss)) +
  geom_line(color = "steelblue", linewidth= 0.7) +
  scale_x_date(date_breaks = "3 month", date_labels = "%m") +
  xlab("Zeit") +
  ylab("Abfluss [mÂ³/s]") +
  labs(title = "Abfluss des Lechs (1992-1996)") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold")
  )

 
ggsave("C:/Users/maggi/OneDrive/Studium/7_Semster/BA/Dat/Plots/Q_lech_1992_1996.png", plot = plot_Qlech_1996, width = 8, height = 5, dpi = 300, bg = "white")

#Gschnitzbach

options(repr.plot.width = 100, repr.plot.height = 6) 
plot_Qgsch_sub <- ggplot(dataQGschnitzbach[dataQGschnitzbach$date >= as.Date("1992-01-01") & dataQGschnitzbach$date <= as.Date("2022-08-31"),],
       aes(x = date, y = Abfluss)) +
  geom_line(color = "steelblue", linewidth= 0.7) +
  geom_smooth(colour="red")+
  scale_x_date(date_breaks = "5 year", date_labels = "%Y") +
  xlab("Zeit") +
  ylab("Abfluss [mÂ³/s]") +
  labs(title = "Abfluss des Gschnitzbachs (1992-2022)") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold")
  )

 
ggsave("C:/Users/maggi/OneDrive/Studium/7_Semster/BA/Dat/Plots/Q_gsch_sub.png", plot = plot_Qgsch_sub, width = 8, height = 5, dpi = 300, bg = "white")


# 30 jahr Periode

dataQleprese_kp <- dataQleprese %>%
  mutate(
    Jahr = year(date),
    Tag = yday(date),
    Tag_umkod = ifelse(Tag < 200, Tag + 365, Tag ),
    kp = paste0(floor((Jahr - 1959) / 30) * 30 + 1959,"-", floor((Jahr- 1959) /30)*30 + 1989, floor((Jahr- 1959)/ 30) * 30 + 2019)
  ) %>%
  group_by(kp, Tag_umkod) %>%
  summarise(
    Abfluss_mean = mean(Abfluss, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

ggplot(dataQleprese_kp,
       aes(x = Tag_umkod, y = Abfluss_mean,
           color = kp,
           group = kp)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1) +
    scale_x_continuous(breaks = c(200, 250, 300, 350, 400, 450, 500, 550), labels = c(200, 250, 300, 350, 34, 84, 134, 184)) + 
  xlab("Tag im Jahr") +
  ylab("Abfluss in mÂ³/s") +
  labs(title = "Abfluss des Poschiavino in Le Prese ", subtitle = "Gemittelt auf den Tag der 30 Jahr Periode") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +                 
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1), 
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold"),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(hjust = 0.5))



dataQlech_kp <- dataQLech %>%
  mutate(
    Jahr = year(date),
    Tag = yday(date),
    Tag_umkod = ifelse(Tag < 200, Tag + 365, Tag ),
    kp = paste0(floor((Jahr - 1951) / 30) * 30 + 1951,"-", floor((Jahr- 1951) /30)*30 + 1981, floor((Jahr- 1951)/ 30) * 30 + 2011)
  ) %>%
  group_by(kp, Tag_umkod) %>%
  summarise(
    Abfluss_mean = mean(Abfluss, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

ggplot(dataQleprese_kp,
       aes(x = Tag_umkod, y = Abfluss_mean,
           color = kp,
           group = kp)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1) +
    scale_x_continuous(breaks = c(200, 250, 300, 350, 400, 450, 500, 550), labels = c(200, 250, 300, 350, 34, 84, 134, 184)) + 
  xlab("Tag im Jahr") +
  ylab("Abfluss in mÂ³/s") +
  labs(title = "Abfluss des Lech in Lech", subtitle = "Gemittelt auf den Tag der 30 Jahr Periode") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +                 
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1), 
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold"),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(hjust = 0.5))


dataQgsch_kp <- dataQGschnitzbach %>%
  mutate(
    Jahr = year(date),
    Tag = yday(date),
    Tag_umkod = ifelse(Tag < 200, Tag + 365, Tag ),
    kp = paste0(floor((Jahr - 1951) / 30) * 30 + 1951,"-", floor((Jahr- 1951) /30)*30 + 1981, floor((Jahr- 1951)/ 30) * 30 + 2011)
  ) %>%
  group_by(kp, Tag_umkod) %>%
  summarise(
    Abfluss_mean = mean(Abfluss, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

ggplot(dataQgsch_kp,
       aes(x = Tag_umkod, y = Abfluss_mean,
           color = kp,
           group = kp)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1) +
    scale_x_continuous(breaks = c(200, 250, 300, 350, 400, 450, 500, 550), labels = c(200, 250, 300, 350, 34, 84, 134, 184)) + 
  xlab("Tag im Jahr") +
  ylab("Abfluss in mÂ³/s") +
  labs(title = "Abfluss des Gschnitzbach in Steinach am Brenner ", subtitle = "Gemittelt auf den Tag der 30 Jahr Periode") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +                 
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1), 
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold"),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(hjust = 0.5))

# Abfluss im FrÃ¼hjahr

#Poschiavino


y_wert <- median(s_Qleprese_ges$Abfluss, na.rm = TRUE) -
             sen_Q_leprese_s_ges$estimates * median(s_Qleprese_ges$Tag, na.rm = TRUE)

s_Qleprese_ges <- s_Qleprese_ges %>%
  mutate(
    Jahr = year(date),
    Tag = yday(date)
  )%>%
  filter(Tag >= 59, Tag <= 181)

ggplot(s_Qleprese_ges,
       aes(x = Tag, y = Abfluss,
           group = Jahr)) +
  geom_line(colour = "grey") +  geom_abline(
    slope = sen_Q_leprese_s_ges$estimates,
    intercept = y_wert,
    colour = "red",
    linewidth = 1.2
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Abfluss in Le Prese",
    x = "Tag des Jahres",
    y = "Abfluss im mÂ³/s",
    color = "Jahr"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()

```

```{r Graphische Darstellung der SchneehÃ¶hen}
#Graphische Darstellung der SchneehÃ¶hen 

  #Schneehoehenplot Ã¼ber den gesamten Zeitraum (auf alle anwendbar)

    #Poschiavino

      #Cavaglia

library(ggplot2)
library(scales)  

options(repr.plot.width = 100, repr.plot.height = 6) 

      # Hoehe /Datum als numeric)
datacavaglia$SchneehÃ¶he <- as.numeric(datacavaglia$HS)
datacavaglia$SchneehÃ¶he_cm <-datacavaglia$SchneehÃ¶he/10

      # Plot erstellen
plot_cav_hs_ges <- ggplot(datacavaglia, aes(x = date , y = SchneehÃ¶he_cm ))+
  geom_line(color = "steelblue", linewidth = 0.7) + 
  scale_x_date(date_breaks = "10 years",            
               date_labels = "%Y") +
  xlab("Zeit") +
  ylab("SchneehÃ¶he [cm]") +
  labs(title = "SchneehÃ¶he in Cavaglia") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +                 
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1), 
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold")
  )





        #Alp Gruem


options(repr.plot.width = 100, repr.plot.height = 6) 

      # Hoehe /Datum als numeric)
datagruem$SchneehÃ¶he <- as.numeric(datagruem$HS)
datagruem$SchneehÃ¶he_cm <-datagruem$SchneehÃ¶he/10

      # Plot erstellen
plot_gruem_hs_ges <- ggplot(datagruem, aes(x = date , y = SchneehÃ¶he_cm ))+
  geom_line(color = "steelblue", linewidth = 0.7) +
  scale_x_date(date_breaks = "10 years",            
               date_labels = "%Y") +
  xlab("Zeit") +
  ylab("SchneehÃ¶he [cm]") +
  labs(title = "SchneehÃ¶he in Alp GrÃ¼m") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +                 
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1), 
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold")
  )




        #Robbia

options(repr.plot.width = 100, repr.plot.height = 6) 

      # Hoehe /Datum als numeric)
datarobbia$SchneehÃ¶he_man <- as.numeric(datarobbia$schnee_man)

      # Plot erstellen
plot_hs_robbia_ges <- ggplot(datarobbia, aes(x = date , y = SchneehÃ¶he_man ))+
  geom_line(color = "steelblue", linewidth = 0.7) +
  scale_x_date(date_breaks = "10 years",            
               date_labels = "%Y") +
  xlab("Zeit") +
  ylab("SchneehÃ¶he [cm]") +
  labs(title = "SchneehÃ¶he in Robbia") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +                 
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1), 
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold")
  )

library(patchwork)
library(ggplot2)
library(gt)

plot_HS_EZG_poschiavino_ges <- (plot_cav_hs_ges + plot_gruem_hs_ges + plot_hs_robbia_ges) + plot_layout(ncol = 2) + plot_annotation (title = "SchneehÃ¶hen im Einzugsgebiet des Poschiavinos", theme = theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 24, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5 )))

ggsave("C:/Users/maggi/OneDrive/Studium/7_Semster/BA/Dat/Plots/HS_EZG_poschiavino_ges.png", plot = plot_HS_EZG_poschiavino_ges, width = 14, height = 10, dpi = 300, bg = "white")



    #Lech
      #Zug

options(repr.plot.width = 100, repr.plot.height = 6) 

      # Hoehe /Datum als numeric)
datazug$SchneehÃ¶he <- as.numeric(datazug$X)


      # Plot erstellen
plot_zug_hs_ges <- ggplot(datazug, aes(x = date , y = SchneehÃ¶he ))+
  geom_line(color = "steelblue", linewidth = 0.7) + 
  scale_x_date(date_breaks = "10 years",            
               date_labels = "%Y") +
  xlab("Zeit") +
  ylab("SchneehÃ¶he [cm]") +
  labs(title = "SchneehÃ¶he in Zug") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +                 
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold")
  )



      #ZÃ¼rs
options(repr.plot.width = 100, repr.plot.height = 6) 

      # Hoehe /Datum als numeric)
datazuers$SchneehÃ¶he <- as.numeric(datazuers$X)


      # Plot erstellen
plot_zuers_hs_ges <- ggplot(datazuers, aes(x = date , y = SchneehÃ¶he ))+
  geom_line(color = "steelblue", linewidth = 0.7) +
  scale_x_date(date_breaks = "10 years",            
               date_labels = "%Y") +
  xlab("Zeit") +
  ylab("SchneehÃ¶he [cm]") +
  labs(title = "SchneehÃ¶he in Zuers") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +                 
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1), 
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold")
  )


     #Lech
options(repr.plot.width = 100, repr.plot.height = 6) 

      # Hoehe /Datum als numeric)
datalech$SchneehÃ¶he <- as.numeric(datalech$HS_cm)


      # Plot erstellen
plot_lech_hs_ges <- ggplot(datalech, aes(x = date , y = SchneehÃ¶he ))+
  geom_line(color = "steelblue", linewidth=0.7) +
  scale_x_date(date_breaks = "10 years",            
               date_labels = "%Y") +
  xlab("Zeit") +
  ylab("SchneehÃ¶he [cm]") +
  labs(title = "SchneehÃ¶he in Lech") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +                 
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1), 
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold")
  )

plot_HS_EZG_Lech_ges <- (plot_lech_hs_ges + plot_zuers_hs_ges + plot_zug_hs_ges) + plot_layout(ncol = 2) + plot_annotation (title = "SchneehÃ¶hen im Einzugsgebiet des Lechs", theme = theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 24, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5 )))


ggsave("C:/Users/maggi/OneDrive/Studium/7_Semster/BA/Dat/Plots/HS_EZG_Lech_ges.png", plot = plot_HS_EZG_Lech_ges, width = 14, height = 10, dpi = 300, bg = "white")

    #Gschnitz
      #Trins
options(repr.plot.width = 100, repr.plot.height = 6) 

      # Hoehe /Datum als numeric)
datatrins$SchneehÃ¶he <- as.numeric(datatrins$X)

      # Plot erstellen
plot_trins_hs_ges <- ggplot(datatrins, aes(x = date , y = SchneehÃ¶he ))+
  geom_line(color = "steelblue", linewidth = 0.7) + 
  scale_x_date(date_breaks = "10 years",            
               date_labels = "%Y") +
  xlab("Zeit") +
  ylab("SchneehÃ¶he [cm]") +
  labs(title = "SchneehÃ¶he in Trins") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +                 
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1), 
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold")
  )



      #Gschnitz
options(repr.plot.width = 100, repr.plot.height = 6) 

      # Hoehe /Datum als numeric)
datagschnitz$SchneehÃ¶he <- as.numeric(datagschnitz$X)


      # Plot erstellen
plot_gsch_hs_ges <- ggplot(datagschnitz, aes(x = date , y = SchneehÃ¶he ))+
  geom_line(color = "steelblue", linewidth = 0.7) + 
  scale_x_date(date_breaks = "10 years",            
               date_labels = "%Y") +
  xlab("Zeit") +
  ylab("SchneehÃ¶he [cm]") +
  labs(title = "SchneehÃ¶he in Gschnitz") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +                 
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1), 
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold")
  )

plot_HS_EZG_gsch_ges <- (plot_trins_hs_ges + plot_gsch_hs_ges) + plot_layout(ncol = 2) + plot_annotation (title = "SchneehÃ¶hen im Einzugsgebiet des Gschnitzbachs", theme = theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 24, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5 )))


ggsave("C:/Users/maggi/OneDrive/Studium/7_Semster/BA/Dat/Plots/HS_EZG_gsch_ges.png", plot = plot_HS_EZG_gsch_ges, width = 14, height = 10, dpi = 300, bg = "white")

# Plot der SchneehÃ¶he aufgeschlÃ¼sselt nach Jahren (Beispiel auf alle anderen Anwendbar)

  #FÃ¼r Beobachtungszeitraum und wenige Jahre
   #Poschiavino
      #Cavaglia
library(scales)

options(repr.plot.width = 100, repr.plot.height = 6) 

ggsave("C:/Users/maggi/OneDrive/Studium/7_Semster/BA/Dat/Plots/HS_cav_sub.png", plot = plot_cav_hs_sub, width = 8, height = 5, dpi = 300,bg = "white")


options(repr.plot.width = 100, repr.plot.height = 6) 
ggplot(datacavaglia[datacavaglia$date >= as.Date("1992-11-01") & datacavaglia$date <= as.Date("1996-10-31"),],
       aes(x = date , y = SchneehÃ¶he_cm)) +
  geom_line(color = "steelblue", linewidth= 0.7) +
  scale_x_date(date_breaks = "3 months", date_labels = "%m") +
  xlab("Zeit") +
  ylab("SchneehÃ¶he in cm") +
  labs(title = "SchneehÃ¶hen in Cavaglia (1.11.1992-31.10.1996)") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold")
  )
        #Alp GrÃ¼m
library(scales)

options(repr.plot.width = 100, repr.plot.height = 6) 
plot_gruem_hs_sub <- ggplot(datagruem[datagruem$date >= as.Date("1992-01-01") & datagruem$date <= as.Date("2022-08-31"),],
       aes(x = date , y = SchneehÃ¶he_cm)) +
  geom_line(color = "steelblue", linewidth= 0.7) +
  scale_x_date(date_breaks = "5 year", date_labels = "%Y") +
  xlab("Zeit") +
  ylab("SchneehÃ¶he in cm") +
  labs(title = "SchneehÃ¶he auf der Alp GrÃ¼m (1992-2022)") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold")
  )
ggsave("C:/Users/maggi/OneDrive/Studium/7_Semster/BA/Dat/Plots/HS_gruem_sub.png", plot = plot_gruem_hs_sub, width = 8, height = 5, dpi = 300,bg = "white")


options(repr.plot.width = 100, repr.plot.height = 6) 
ggplot(datagruem[datagruem$date >= as.Date("1992-11-01") & datagruem$date <= as.Date("1996-10-31"),],
       aes(x = date , y = SchneehÃ¶he_cm)) +
  geom_line(color = "steelblue", linewidth= 0.7) +
  scale_x_date(date_breaks = "3 months", date_labels = "%m") +
  xlab("Zeit") +
  ylab("SchneehÃ¶he in cm") +
  labs(title = "SchneehÃ¶hen auf der Alpe GrÃ¼m (1.11.1992-31.10.1996)") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold")
  )
        #Robbia
library(scales)

options(repr.plot.width = 100, repr.plot.height = 6) 
plot_robbia_hs_sub <- ggplot(datarobbia[datarobbia$date >= as.Date("1992-01-01") & datarobbia$date <= as.Date("2022-08-31"),],
       aes(x = date, y = schnee_man)) +
  geom_line(color = "steelblue", linewidth= 0.7) +
  scale_x_date(date_breaks = "5 year", date_labels = "%Y") +
  xlab("Zeit") +
  ylab("SchneehÃ¶he in cm") +
  labs(title = "SchneehÃ¶he in Robbia (1992-2022)") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold")
  )

ggsave("C:/Users/maggi/OneDrive/Studium/7_Semster/BA/Dat/Plots/HS_robbia_sub.png", plot = plot_robbia_hs_sub, width = 8, height = 5, dpi = 300, bg = "white")


options(repr.plot.width = 100, repr.plot.height = 6) 
ggplot(datarobbia[datarobbia$date >= as.Date("1992-11-01") & datarobbia$date <= as.Date("1996-10-31"),],
       aes(x = date, y = schnee_man)) +
  geom_line(color = "steelblue", linewidth= 0.7) +
  scale_x_date(date_breaks = "3 months", date_labels = "%m") +
  xlab("Zeit") +
  ylab("SchneehÃ¶he in cm") +
  labs(title = "SchneehÃ¶hen in Robbia (1.11.1992-31.10.1996)") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold")
  )
    #Lech
      #Lech
library(scales)

options(repr.plot.width = 100, repr.plot.height = 6) 
plot_lech_hs_sub <- ggplot(datalech[datalech$date >= as.Date("1992-01-01") & datalech$date <= as.Date("2022-08-31"),],
       aes(x = date, y = SchneehÃ¶he)) +
  geom_line(color = "steelblue", linewidth= 0.7) +
  scale_x_date(date_breaks = "5 year", date_labels = "%Y") +
  xlab("Zeit") +
  ylab("SchneehÃ¶he in cm") +
  labs(title = "SchneehÃ¶he in Lech (1992-2022)") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold")
  )
ggsave("C:/Users/maggi/OneDrive/Studium/7_Semster/BA/Dat/Plots/HS_lech_sub.png", plot = plot_lech_hs_sub, width = 8, height = 5, dpi = 300, bg = "white")


options(repr.plot.width = 100, repr.plot.height = 6) 
ggplot(datalech[datalech$date >= as.Date("1992-11-01") & datalech$date <= as.Date("1996-10-31"),],
       aes(x = date, y = SchneehÃ¶he)) +
  geom_line(color = "steelblue", linewidth= 0.7) +
  scale_x_date(date_breaks = "3 months", date_labels = "%m") +
  xlab("Zeit") +
  ylab("SchneehÃ¶he in cm") +
  labs(title = "SchneehÃ¶hen in Lech (1.11.1992-31.10.1996)") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold")
  )
      #Zuers
library(scales)

options(repr.plot.width = 100, repr.plot.height = 6) 
plot_zuers_hs_sub <- ggplot(datazuers[datazuers$date >= as.Date("1992-01-01") & datazuers$date <= as.Date("2022-08-31"),],
       aes(x = date, y = SchneehÃ¶he)) +
  geom_line(color = "steelblue", linewidth= 0.7) +
  scale_x_date(date_breaks = "5 year", date_labels = "%Y") +
  xlab("Zeit") +
  ylab("SchneehÃ¶he in cm") +
  labs(title = "SchneehÃ¶he in ZÃ¼rs (1992-2022)") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold")
  )
ggsave("C:/Users/maggi/OneDrive/Studium/7_Semster/BA/Dat/Plots/HS_zuers_sub.png", plot = plot_zuers_hs_sub, width = 8, height = 5, dpi = 300, bg = "white")


options(repr.plot.width = 100, repr.plot.height = 6) 
ggplot(datazuers[datazuers$date >= as.Date("1992-11-01") & datazuers$date <= as.Date("1996-10-31"),],
       aes(x = date, y = SchneehÃ¶he)) +
  geom_line(color = "steelblue", linewidth= 0.7) +
  scale_x_date(date_breaks = "3 months", date_labels = "%m") +
  xlab("Zeit") +
  ylab("SchneehÃ¶he in cm") +
  labs(title = "SchneehÃ¶hen in ZÃ¼rs (1.11.1992-31.10.1996)") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold")
  )
      #Zug
library(scales)

options(repr.plot.width = 100, repr.plot.height = 6) 
plot_zug_hs_sub <- ggplot(datazug[datazug$date >= as.Date("1992-01-01") & datazug$date <= as.Date("2022-08-31"),],
       aes(x = date, y = SchneehÃ¶he)) +
  geom_line(color = "steelblue", linewidth= 0.7) +
  scale_x_date(date_breaks = "5 year", date_labels = "%Y") +
  xlab("Zeit") +
  ylab("SchneehÃ¶he in cm") +
  labs(title = "SchneehÃ¶he in Zug (1992-2022)") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold")
  )

options(repr.plot.width = 100, repr.plot.height = 6) 
ggplot(datazug[datazug$date >= as.Date("1992-11-01") & datazug$date <= as.Date("1996-10-31"),],
       aes(x = date, y = SchneehÃ¶he)) +
  geom_line(color = "steelblue", linewidth= 0.7) +
  scale_x_date(date_breaks = "3 months", date_labels = "%m") +
  xlab("Zeit") +
  ylab("SchneehÃ¶he in cm") +
  labs(title = "SchneehÃ¶hen in Zug (1.11.1992-31.10.1996)") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +

    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold")
  )
   #Gschnitzbach
       #Trins
library(scales)

options(repr.plot.width = 100, repr.plot.height = 6) 
plot_trins_hs_sub <- ggplot(datatrins[datatrins$date >= as.Date("1992-01-01") & datatrins$date <= as.Date("2022-08-31"),],
       aes(x = date, y = SchneehÃ¶he)) +
  geom_line(color = "steelblue", linewidth= 0.7) +
  scale_x_date(date_breaks = "5 year", date_labels = "%Y") +
  xlab("Zeit") +
  ylab("SchneehÃ¶he in cm") +
  labs(title = "SchneehÃ¶he in Trins (1992-2022)") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold")
  )
ggsave("C:/Users/maggi/OneDrive/Studium/7_Semster/BA/Dat/Plots/HS_trins_sub.png", plot = plot_trins_hs_sub, width = 8, height = 5, dpi = 300, bg = "white")


options(repr.plot.width = 100, repr.plot.height = 6) 
ggplot(datatrins[datatrins$date >= as.Date("1992-11-01") & datatrins$date <= as.Date("1996-10-31"),],
       aes(x = date, y = SchneehÃ¶he)) +
  geom_line(color = "steelblue", linewidth= 0.7) +
  scale_x_date(date_breaks = "3 months", date_labels = "%m") +
  xlab("Zeit") +
  ylab("SchneehÃ¶he in cm") +
  labs(title = "SchneehÃ¶hen in Trins (1.11.1992-31.10.1996)") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold")
  )
        #Gschnitz
library(scales)

options(repr.plot.width = 100, repr.plot.height = 6) 
plot_gsch_hs_sub <- ggplot(datagschnitz[datagschnitz$date >= as.Date("1992-01-01") & datagschnitz$date <= as.Date("2022-08-31"),],
       aes(x = date, y = SchneehÃ¶he)) +
  geom_line(color = "steelblue", linewidth= 0.7) +
  scale_x_date(date_breaks = "5 year", date_labels = "%Y") +
  xlab("Zeit") +
  ylab("SchneehÃ¶he in cm") +
  labs(title = "SchneehÃ¶he in Gschnitz (1992-2022)") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold")
  )
ggsave("C:/Users/maggi/OneDrive/Studium/7_Semster/BA/Dat/Plots/HS_gsch_sub.png", plot = plot_gsch_hs_sub, width = 8, height = 5, dpi = 300, bg = "white")


options(repr.plot.width = 100, repr.plot.height = 6) 
plot_gsch_hs_1996 <- ggplot(datagschnitz[datagschnitz$date >= as.Date("1992-11-01") & datagschnitz$date <= as.Date("1996-10-31"),],
       aes(x = date, y = SchneehÃ¶he)) +
  geom_line(color = "steelblue", linewidth= 0.7) +
  scale_x_date(date_breaks = "3 months", date_labels = "%m") +
  xlab("Zeit") +
  ylab("SchneehÃ¶he in cm") +
  labs(title = "SchneehÃ¶hen in Gschnitz (1.11.1992-31.10.1996)") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold")
  )
ggsave("C:/Users/maggi/OneDrive/Studium/7_Semster/BA/Dat/Plots/HS_gsch_1996.png", plot = plot_gsch_hs_1996, width = 8, height = 5, dpi = 300, bg = "white")


```

```{r Graphische Darstellung des SWE}
library(ggplot2)
 #Plots SWE (auf alle anwendbar)


  #Cavaglia

options(repr.plot.width = 100, repr.plot.height = 6) 



plot_cav_SWE_ges <- ggplot(datacavaglia, aes(x = date , y = SWE ))+
  geom_line(color = "steelblue", linewidth=0.7) + 
  scale_x_date(date_breaks = "10 years",            
               date_labels = "%Y") +
  xlab("Zeit") +
  ylab("SWE [mm]") +
  labs(title = "SWE in Cavaglia") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +                 
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1), 
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold")
  )



  # Alp GrÃ¼m

options(repr.plot.width = 100, repr.plot.height = 6) 



plot_gruem_SWE_ges <- ggplot(datagruem, aes(x = date , y = SWE ))+
  geom_line(color = "steelblue", linewidth=0.7) + 
  scale_x_date(date_breaks = "10 years",            
               date_labels = "%Y") +
  xlab("Zeit") +
  ylab("SWE [mm]") +
  labs(title = "SWE auf der Alp GrÃ¼m") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +                 
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1), 
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold")
  )


  #Robbia


options(repr.plot.width = 100, repr.plot.height = 6) 




plot_robbia_SWE_ges <- ggplot(datarobbia, aes(x = date , y = SWE ))+
  geom_line(color = "steelblue", linewidth=0.7) +  
  scale_x_date(date_breaks = "10 years",            
               date_labels = "%Y") +
  xlab("Zeit") +
  ylab("SWE [mm]") +
  labs(title = "SWE in Robbia") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +                 
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1), 
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold")
  )


#Lech
options(repr.plot.width = 100, repr.plot.height = 6) 



plot_lech_SWE_ges <- ggplot(datalech, aes(x = date , y = SWE ))+
  geom_line(color = "steelblue", linewidth=0.7) + 
  scale_x_date(date_breaks = "10 years",            
               date_labels = "%Y") +
  xlab("Zeit") +
  ylab("SWE [mm]") +
  labs(title = "SWE in Lech") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +                 
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1), 
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold")
  )


#Zug 
options(repr.plot.width = 100, repr.plot.height = 6) 



plot_zug_SWE_ges <- ggplot(datazug, aes(x = date , y = SWE ))+
  geom_line(color = "steelblue", linewidth=0.7) + 
  scale_x_date(date_breaks = "10 years",            
               date_labels = "%Y") +
  xlab("Zeit") +
  ylab("SWE [mm]") +
  labs(title = "SWE in Zug") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +                 
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1), 
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold")
  )


#ZÃ¼rs

options(repr.plot.width = 100, repr.plot.height = 6) 



plot_zuers_SWE_ges <- ggplot(datazuers, aes(x = date , y = SWE ))+
  geom_line(color = "steelblue", linewidth=0.7) + 
  scale_x_date(date_breaks = "10 years",            
               date_labels = "%Y") +
  xlab("Zeit") +
  ylab("SWE [mm]") +
  labs(title = "SWE in ZÃ¼rs") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +                 
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1), 
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold")
  )

#Trins

options(repr.plot.width = 100, repr.plot.height = 6) 



plot_trins_SWE_ges <- ggplot(datatrins, aes(x = date , y = SWE ))+
  geom_line(color = "steelblue", linewidth=0.7) + 
  scale_x_date(date_breaks = "10 years",            
               date_labels = "%Y") +
  xlab("Zeit") +
  ylab("SWE [mm]") +
  labs(title = "SWE in Trins") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +                 
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1), 
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold")
  )

#Gschnitz

options(repr.plot.width = 100, repr.plot.height = 6) 



plot_gsch_SWE_ges <- ggplot(datagschnitz, aes(x = date , y = SWE ))+
  geom_line(color = "steelblue", linewidth=0.7) + 
  scale_x_date(date_breaks = "10 years",            
               date_labels = "%Y") +
  xlab("Zeit") +
  ylab("SWE [mm]") +
  labs(title = "SWE in Gschnitz") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +                 
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1), 
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold")
  )

library(patchwork)
library(ggplot2)

plot_SWE_gesamt <- (plot_cav_SWE_ges + plot_gruem_SWE_ges + plot_robbia_SWE_ges + plot_lech_SWE_ges + plot_zuers_SWE_ges + plot_zug_SWE_ges + plot_trins_SWE_ges + plot_gsch_SWE_ges) + plot_layout(ncol = 2) + plot_annotation (title = "SWE-Zeitreihen aller Stationen fÃ¼r den gesamten Zeitraum", theme = theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 24, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5 )))


ggsave("C:/Users/maggi/OneDrive/Studium/7_Semster/BA/Dat/Plots/SWE_gesamt.png", plot = plot_SWE_gesamt, width = 14, height = 10, dpi = 300, bg = "white")


#SWE Plot fÃ¼r den Subsetzeitraum 
#Cavglia
options(repr.plot.width = 100, repr.plot.height = 6) 
plot_cav_SWE_sub <- ggplot(datacavaglia[datacavaglia$date >= as.Date("1992-01-01") & datacavaglia$date <= as.Date("2022-08-31"),],
       aes(x = date, y = SWE)) +
  geom_line(color = "steelblue", linewidth= 0.7) +
  scale_x_date(date_breaks = "5 year", date_labels = "%Y") +
  xlab("Zeit") +
  ylab("SWE [mm]") +
  labs(title = "SWE in Cavaglia") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold")
  )

#Alp GrÃ¼m

options(repr.plot.width = 100, repr.plot.height = 6) 
plot_gruem_SWE_sub <- ggplot(datagruem[datagruem$date >= as.Date("1992-01-01") & datagruem$date <= as.Date("2022-08-31"),],
       aes(x = date, y = SWE)) +
  geom_line(color = "steelblue", linewidth= 0.7) +
  scale_x_date(date_breaks = "5 year", date_labels = "%Y") +
  xlab("Zeit") +
  ylab("SWE [mm]") +
  labs(title = "SWE auf der Alp GrÃ¼m") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold")
  )

options(repr.plot.width = 100, repr.plot.height = 6) 
plot_gruem_SWE_1996 <- ggplot(datagruem[datagruem$date >= as.Date("1992-11-01") & datagruem$date <= as.Date("1996-10-31"),],
       aes(x = date, y = SWE)) +
  geom_line(color = "steelblue", linewidth= 0.7) +
  scale_x_date(date_breaks = "3 month", date_labels = "%m") +
  xlab("Zeit") +
  ylab("SWE [mm]") +
  labs(title = "SWE auf der Alp GrÃ¼m 1992 - 1996") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold")
  )


#Robbia

options(repr.plot.width = 100, repr.plot.height = 6) 
plot_robbia_SWE_sub <- ggplot(datarobbia[datarobbia$date >= as.Date("1992-01-01") & datarobbia$date <= as.Date("2022-08-31"),],
       aes(x = date, y = SWE)) +
  geom_line(color = "steelblue", linewidth= 0.7) +
  scale_x_date(date_breaks = "5 year", date_labels = "%Y") +
  xlab("Zeit") +
  ylab("SWE [mm]") + 
  labs(title = "SWE in Robbia") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold")
  )

#lech

options(repr.plot.width = 100, repr.plot.height = 6) 
plot_lech_SWE_sub <- ggplot(datalech[datalech$date >= as.Date("1992-01-01") & datalech$date <= as.Date("2022-08-31"),],
       aes(x = date, y = SWE)) +
  geom_line(color = "steelblue", linewidth= 0.7) +
  scale_x_date(date_breaks = "5 year", date_labels = "%Y") +
  xlab("Zeit") +
  ylab("SWE [mm]") + 
  labs(title = "SWE in Lech") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold")
  )

#Zug


options(repr.plot.width = 100, repr.plot.height = 6) 
plot_zug_SWE_sub <- ggplot(datazug[datazug$date >= as.Date("1992-01-01") & datazug$date <= as.Date("2022-08-31"),],
       aes(x = date, y = SWE)) +
  geom_line(color = "steelblue", linewidth= 0.7) +
  scale_x_date(date_breaks = "5 year", date_labels = "%Y") +
  xlab("Zeit") +
  ylab("SWE [mm]") + 
  labs(title = "SWE in Zug") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold")
  )

#ZÃ¼rs

options(repr.plot.width = 100, repr.plot.height = 6) 
plot_zuers_SWE_sub <- ggplot(datazuers[datazuers$date >= as.Date("1992-01-01") & datazuers$date <= as.Date("2022-08-31"),],
       aes(x = date, y = SWE)) +
  geom_line(color = "steelblue", linewidth= 0.7) +
  scale_x_date(date_breaks = "5 year", date_labels = "%Y") +
  xlab("Zeit") +
  ylab("SWE [mm]") + 
  labs(title = "SWE in ZÃ¼rs") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold")
  )

#Trins


options(repr.plot.width = 100, repr.plot.height = 6) 
plot_trins_SWE_sub <- ggplot(datatrins[datatrins$date >= as.Date("1992-01-01") & datatrins$date <= as.Date("2022-08-31"),],
       aes(x = date, y = SWE)) +
  geom_line(color = "steelblue", linewidth= 0.7) +
  scale_x_date(date_breaks = "5 year", date_labels = "%Y") +
  xlab("Zeit") +
  ylab("SWE [mm]") + 
  labs(title = "SWE in Trins") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold")
  )


#Gschnitz



options(repr.plot.width = 100, repr.plot.height = 6) 
plot_gsch_SWE_sub <- ggplot(datagschnitz[datagschnitz$date >= as.Date("1992-01-01") & datagschnitz$date <= as.Date("2022-08-31"),],
       aes(x = date, y = SWE)) +
  geom_line(color = "steelblue", linewidth= 0.7) +
  scale_x_date(date_breaks = "5 year", date_labels = "%Y") +
  xlab("Zeit") +
  ylab("SWE [mm]") + 
  labs(title = "SWE in Gschnitz") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold")
  )


plot_SWE_sub <- (plot_cav_SWE_sub + plot_gruem_SWE_sub + plot_robbia_SWE_sub + plot_lech_SWE_sub + plot_zuers_SWE_sub + plot_zug_SWE_sub + plot_trins_SWE_sub + plot_gsch_SWE_sub) + plot_layout(ncol = 2) + plot_annotation (title = "SWE-Zeitreihen aller Stationen von 1992 - 2022", theme = theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 24, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5 )))


ggsave("C:/Users/maggi/OneDrive/Studium/7_Semster/BA/Dat/Plots/SWE_subset.png", plot = plot_SWE_sub, width = 14, height = 10, dpi = 300, bg = "white")
```

```{r Graphische Darstellung der Dekaden des SWE}
library(dplyr)
library(lubridate)
library(ggplot2)
#Cavaglia
datacavaglia_dekade <- datacavaglia %>%
  mutate(
    Jahr = year(date),
    Tag = yday(date),
    Tag_umkod = ifelse(Tag < 200, Tag + 365, Tag ),
    Dekade = paste0(floor(Jahr / 10) * 10, "er")
  ) %>%
  group_by(Dekade, Tag_umkod) %>%
  summarise(
    SWE_mean = mean(SWE, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

plot_cav_SWE_dek <- ggplot(datacavaglia_dekade,
       aes(x = Tag_umkod, y = SWE_mean,
           color = Dekade,
           group = Dekade)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1) +
    scale_x_continuous(breaks = c(200, 250, 300, 350, 400, 450, 500, 550), labels = c(200, 250, 300, 350, 34, 84, 134, 184)) + 
  xlab("Tag im Jahr") +
  ylab("SWE in mm") +
  labs(title = "SWE in Cavaglia") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +                 
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1), 
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold"),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(hjust = 0.5))

datacavaglia_kp <- datacavaglia %>%
  mutate(
  Jahr = year(date),
  Tag = yday(date),
  Tag_umkod = ifelse(Tag < 200, Tag + 365, Tag),
  start = floor((Jahr - 1945) / 30) * 30 + 1945,
  ende = start + 29,
  kp = paste0(start, "-", ende)
) %>%
  group_by(kp, Tag_umkod) %>%
  summarise(
    SWE_mean = mean(SWE, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

plot_cav_SWE_kp <- ggplot(datacavaglia_kp,
       aes(x = Tag_umkod, y = SWE_mean,
           color = kp,
           group = kp)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1) +
    scale_x_continuous(breaks = c(200, 250, 300, 350, 400, 450, 500, 550), labels = c(200, 250, 300, 350, 34, 84, 134, 184)) + 
  xlab("Tag im Jahr") +
  ylab("SWE [mm]") +
  scale_color_discrete(name = "Zeitraum") +
  labs(title = "SWE in Cavaglia") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +                 
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1), 
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold"),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(hjust = 0.5))

# Alp GrÃ¼m 

datagruem_dekade <- datagruem %>%
  mutate(
    Jahr = year(date),
    Tag = yday(date),
        Tag_umkod = ifelse(Tag < 200, Tag + 365, Tag ),
    Dekade = paste0(floor(Jahr / 10) * 10, "er")
  ) %>%
  group_by(Dekade, Tag_umkod) %>%
  summarise(
    SWE_mean = mean(SWE, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

plot_gruem_SWE_dek <- ggplot(datagruem_dekade,
       aes(x = Tag_umkod, y = SWE_mean,
           color = Dekade,
           group = Dekade)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1) +    
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = c(200, 250, 300, 350, 400, 450, 500, 550), labels = c(200, 250, 300, 350, 34, 84, 134, 184)) + 
  xlab("Tag im Jahr") +
  ylab("SWE in mm") +
  labs(title = "SWE auf der Alp GrÃ¼m") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +                 
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1), 
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold"),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(hjust = 0.5)
  )

datagruem_kp <- datagruem %>%
  mutate(
    Jahr = year(date),
    Tag = yday(date),
        Tag_umkod = ifelse(Tag < 200, Tag + 365, Tag ),
   start = floor((Jahr - 1953) / 30) * 30 + 1953,
  ende = start + 29,
  kp = paste0(start, "-", ende)
) %>%
  group_by(kp, Tag_umkod) %>%
  summarise(
    SWE_mean = mean(SWE, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

plot_gruem_SWE_kp <- ggplot(datagruem_kp,
       aes(x = Tag_umkod, y = SWE_mean,
           color = kp,
           group = kp)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1) +    
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = c(200, 250, 300, 350, 400, 450, 500, 550), labels = c(200, 250, 300, 350, 34, 84, 134, 184)) + 
  xlab("Tag im Jahr") +
  ylab("SWE in mm") +
  labs(title = "SWE auf der Alp GrÃ¼m") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +                 
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1), 
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold"),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(hjust = 0.5)
  )

#Robbia

datarobbia_dekade <- datarobbia %>%
  mutate(
    Jahr = year(date),
    Tag = yday(date),
    Tag_umkod = ifelse(Tag < 200, Tag + 365, Tag ),
    Dekade = paste0(floor(Jahr / 10) * 10, "er")) %>%
  group_by(Dekade, Tag_umkod) %>%
  summarise(
    SWE_mean = mean(SWE, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

plot_robbia_SWE_dek <- ggplot(datarobbia_dekade,
       aes(x = Tag_umkod, y = SWE_mean,
           color = Dekade,
           group = Dekade)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1) +
    scale_x_continuous(breaks = c(200, 250, 300, 350, 400, 450, 500, 550), labels = c(200, 250, 300, 350, 34, 84, 134, 184)) + 
  xlab("Tag im Jahr") +
  ylab("SWE in mm") +
  labs(title = "SWE in Robbia") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +                 
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1), 
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold"),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(hjust = 0.5)
  )

datarobbia_kp <- datarobbia %>%
  mutate(
    Jahr = year(date),
    Tag = yday(date),
    Tag_umkod = ifelse(Tag < 200, Tag + 365, Tag ),
    start = floor((Jahr - 1960) / 30) * 30 + 1960,
  ende = start + 29,
  kp = paste0(start, "-", ende)
)%>%
  group_by(kp, Tag_umkod) %>%
  summarise(
    SWE_mean = mean(SWE, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

plot_robbia_SWE_kp <- ggplot(datarobbia_kp,
       aes(x = Tag_umkod, y = SWE_mean,
           color = kp,
           group = kp)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1) +
    scale_x_continuous(breaks = c(200, 250, 300, 350, 400, 450, 500, 550), labels = c(200, 250, 300, 350, 34, 84, 134, 184)) + 
  xlab("Tag im Jahr") +
  ylab("SWE in mm") +
  labs(title = "SWE in Robbia") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +                 
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1), 
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold"),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(hjust = 0.5)
  )

#Lech
datalech_dekade <- datalech %>%
  mutate(
    Jahr = year(date),
    Tag = yday(date),
    Tag_umkod = ifelse(Tag < 200, Tag + 365, Tag ),
    Dekade = paste0(floor(Jahr / 10) * 10, "er")
  ) %>%
  group_by(Dekade, Tag_umkod) %>%
  summarise(
    SWE_mean = mean(SWE, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )


plot_lech_SWE_dek <- ggplot(datalech_dekade,
       aes(x = Tag_umkod, y = SWE_mean,
           color = Dekade,
           group = Dekade)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = c(200, 250, 300, 350, 400, 450, 500, 550), labels = c(200, 250, 300, 350, 34, 84, 134, 184)) + 
  xlab("Tag im Jahr") +
  ylab("SWE in mm") +
  labs(title = "SWE in Lech") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +                 
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1), 
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold"),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(hjust = 0.5)
  )

datalech_kp <- datalech %>%
  mutate(
    Jahr = year(date),
    Tag = yday(date),
    Tag_umkod = ifelse(Tag < 200, Tag + 365, Tag ),
     start = floor((Jahr - 1970) / 30) * 30 + 1970,
  ende = start + 29,
  kp = paste0(start, "-", ende)
) %>%
  group_by(kp, Tag_umkod) %>%
  summarise(
    SWE_mean = mean(SWE, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )


plot_lech_SWE_kp <- ggplot(datalech_kp,
       aes(x = Tag_umkod, y = SWE_mean,
           color = kp,
           group = kp)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = c(200, 250, 300, 350, 400, 450, 500, 550), labels = c(200, 250, 300, 350, 34, 84, 134, 184)) + 
  xlab("Tag im Jahr") +
  ylab("SWE in mm") +
  labs(title = "SWE in Lech") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +                 
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1), 
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold"),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(hjust = 0.5)
  )

#Zug

datazug_dekade <- datazug %>%
  mutate(
    Jahr = year(date),
    Tag = yday(date),
         Tag_umkod = ifelse(Tag < 200, Tag + 365, Tag ),
    Dekade = paste0(floor(Jahr / 10) * 10, "er")
  ) %>%
  group_by(Dekade, Tag_umkod) %>%
  summarise(
    SWE_mean = mean(SWE, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

plot_zug_SWE_dek <- ggplot(datazug_dekade,
       aes(x = Tag_umkod, y = SWE_mean,
           color = Dekade,
           group = Dekade)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = c(200, 250, 300, 350, 400, 450, 500, 550), labels = c(200, 250, 300, 350, 34, 84, 134, 184)) + 
  xlab("Tag im Jahr") +
  ylab("SWE in mm") +
  labs(title = "SWE in Zug") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +                 
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1), 
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold"),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(hjust = 0.5)
  )

#ZÃ¼rs

datazuers_dekade <- datazuers %>%
  mutate(
    Jahr = year(date),
    Tag = yday(date),
     Tag_umkod = ifelse(Tag < 200, Tag + 365, Tag ),
    Dekade = paste0(floor(Jahr / 10) * 10, "er")
  ) %>%
  group_by(Dekade, Tag_umkod) %>%
  summarise(
    SWE_mean = mean(SWE, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

plot_zuers_SWE_dek <- ggplot(datazuers_dekade,
       aes(x = Tag_umkod, y = SWE_mean,
           color = Dekade,
           group = Dekade)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1) +
     scale_x_continuous(breaks = c(200, 250, 300, 350, 400, 450, 500, 550), labels = c(200, 250, 300, 350, 34, 84, 134, 184)) + 
  xlab("Tag im Jahr") +
  ylab("SWE in mm") +
  labs(title = "SWE in ZÃ¼rs") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +                 
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1), 
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold"),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(hjust = 0.5)
  )
datazuers_kp <- datazuers %>%
  mutate(
    Jahr = year(date),
    Tag = yday(date),
     Tag_umkod = ifelse(Tag < 200, Tag + 365, Tag ),
     start = floor((Jahr - 1970) / 30) * 30 + 1970,
  ende = start + 29,
  kp = paste0(start, "-", ende)
) %>%
  group_by(kp, Tag_umkod) %>%
  summarise(
    SWE_mean = mean(SWE, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

plot_zuers_SWE_kp <- ggplot(datazuers_kp,
       aes(x = Tag_umkod, y = SWE_mean,
           color = kp,
           group = kp)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1) +
     scale_x_continuous(breaks = c(200, 250, 300, 350, 400, 450, 500, 550), labels = c(200, 250, 300, 350, 34, 84, 134, 184)) + 
  xlab("Tag im Jahr") +
  ylab("SWE in mm") +
  labs(title = "SWE in ZÃ¼rs") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +                 
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1), 
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold"),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(hjust = 0.5)
  )

#Trins

datatrins_dekade <- datatrins %>%
  mutate(
    Jahr = year(date),
    Tag = yday(date),
    Tag_umkod = ifelse(Tag < 200, Tag + 365, Tag ),
    Dekade = paste0(floor(Jahr / 10) * 10, "er")
  ) %>%
  group_by(Dekade, Tag_umkod) %>%
  summarise(
    SWE_mean = mean(SWE, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

plot_trins_SWE_dek <- ggplot(datatrins_dekade,
       aes(x = Tag_umkod, y = SWE_mean,
           color = Dekade,
           group = Dekade)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1) +
    scale_x_continuous(breaks = c(200, 250, 300, 350, 400, 450, 500, 550), labels = c(200, 250, 300, 350, 34, 84, 134, 184)) + 
  xlab("Tag im Jahr") +
  ylab("SWE in mm") +
  labs(title = "SWE in Trins") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +                 
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1), 
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold"),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(hjust = 0.5)
  )


datatrins_kp <- datatrins %>%
  mutate(
    Jahr = year(date),
    Tag = yday(date),
    Tag_umkod = ifelse(Tag < 200, Tag + 365, Tag ),
     start = floor((Jahr - 1970) / 30) * 30 + 1970,
  ende = start + 29,
  kp = paste0(start, "-", ende)
) %>%
  group_by(kp, Tag_umkod) %>%
  summarise(
    SWE_mean = mean(SWE, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

plot_trins_SWE_kp <- ggplot(datatrins_kp,
       aes(x = Tag_umkod, y = SWE_mean,
           color = kp,
           group = kp)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1) +
    scale_x_continuous(breaks = c(200, 250, 300, 350, 400, 450, 500, 550), labels = c(200, 250, 300, 350, 34, 84, 134, 184)) + 
  xlab("Tag im Jahr") +
  ylab("SWE in mm") +
  labs(title = "SWE in Trins") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +                 
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1), 
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold"),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(hjust = 0.5)
  )


#Gschnitz

datagsch_dekade <- datagschnitz %>%
  mutate(
    Jahr = year(date),
    Tag = yday(date),
    Tag_umkod = ifelse(Tag < 200, Tag + 366, Tag),
    Dekade = paste0(floor(Jahr / 10) * 10, "er")
  ) %>%
  group_by(Dekade, Tag_umkod) %>%
  summarise(
    SWE_mean = mean(SWE, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

plot_gsch_SWE_dek <- ggplot(datagsch_dekade,
       aes(x = Tag_umkod, y = SWE_mean,
           color = Dekade,
           group = Dekade)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1) + 
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = c(200, 250, 300, 350, 400, 450, 500, 550), labels = c(200, 250, 300, 350, 34, 84, 134, 184)) + 
  xlab("Tag im Jahr") +
  ylab("SWE in mm") +
  labs(title = "SWE in Gschnitz") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +                 
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1), 
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold"),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(hjust = 0.5)
  )

library(patchwork)
library(ggplot2)

plot_SWE_dekade <- (plot_cav_SWE_dek + plot_gruem_SWE_dek + plot_robbia_SWE_dek + plot_lech_SWE_dek + plot_zuers_SWE_dek + plot_zug_SWE_dek + plot_trins_SWE_dek + plot_gsch_SWE_dek) + plot_layout(ncol = 2) + plot_annotation (title = "SWE der Stationen", subtitle = "Gemittelt auf den Tag der jeweiligen Dekade", theme = theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 24, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5 ), plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold")))


ggsave("C:/Users/maggi/OneDrive/Studium/7_Semster/BA/Dat/Plots/SWE_dekade.png", plot = plot_SWE_dekade, width = 14, height = 10, dpi = 300, bg = "white")

plot_SWE_kp <- (plot_cav_SWE_kp + plot_gruem_SWE_kp + plot_robbia_SWE_kp + plot_lech_SWE_kp + plot_zuers_SWE_kp + plot_trins_SWE_kp) + plot_layout(ncol = 2) + plot_annotation (title = "SWE der Stationen", subtitle = "Gemittelt auf den Tag der jeweiligen 30 Jahr Periode", theme = theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 24, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5 ), plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold")))


ggsave("C:/Users/maggi/OneDrive/Studium/7_Semster/BA/Dat/Plots/SWE_kp.png", plot = plot_SWE_kp, width = 14, height = 10, dpi = 300, bg = "white")

```

```{r Graphische Darstellung der Nullwert fÃ¼r den subsset und den gesamten Zeitraum fÃ¼r die SchneehÃ¶he, Winter und FrÃ¼hling}

print(ss_zr_cav) #ns
print(ss_zr_gruem)  #ns
print(ss_zr_rob )#s
print(ss_zr_lech)#s
print(ss_zr_zuers)  #s
print(ss_zr_zug) #ns
print(ss_zr_trins)  #s
print(ss_zr_gsch) #ns

print(ss_zr_cav_s_ges)#ns
print(ss_zr_gruem_s_ges) #ns
print(ss_zr_rob_s_ges) #s
print(ss_zr_lech_s_ges) #ns
print(ss_zr_zuers_s_ges) #s
print(ss_zr_zug_s_ges) #ns
print(ss_zr_trins_s_ges)#s
print(ss_zr_gsch_s_ges) #ns

print(ss_zr_cav_w_ges) #s
print(ss_zr_gruem_w_ges) #s
print(ss_zr_rob_w_ges) #s
print(ss_zr_lech_w_ges) #s
print(ss_zr_zuers_w_ges) #ns
print(ss_zr_zug_w_ges) #ns
print(ss_zr_trins_w_ges) #ns
print(ss_zr_gsch_w_ges) #ns

print(ss_zr_cav_sub) #ns
print(ss_zr_gruem_sub)  #ns
print(ss_zr_rob_sub )#ns
print(ss_zr_lech_sub)#s
print(ss_zr_zuers_sub) #ns 
print(ss_zr_zug_sub) #ns
print(ss_zr_trins_sub)  #ns
print(ss_zr_gsch_sub) #ns

print(ss_zr_cav_s_sub)#ns
print(ss_zr_gruem_s_sub) #ns
print(ss_zr_rob_s_sub) #s
print(ss_zr_lech_s_sub) #ns
print(ss_zr_zuers_s_sub) #ns
print(ss_zr_zug_s_sub) #ns
print(ss_zr_trins_s_sub)#s
print(ss_zr_gsch_s_sub) #ns

print(ss_zr_cav_w_sub) #ns
print(ss_zr_gruem_w_sub) #ns
print(ss_zr_rob_w_sub) #ns
print(ss_zr_lech_w_sub) #ns
print(ss_zr_zuers_w_sub) #ns
print(ss_zr_zug_w_sub) #ns
print(ss_zr_trins_w_sub) #ns
print(ss_zr_gsch_w_sub) #ns

#Tabelle

zr_hs_table <- data.frame(Fluss = c("Cavaglia","Alp GrÃ¼m", "Robbia", "Lech", "Zuers", "Zug", "Trins","Gschnitz"),
                                 
Schneeperiode = c(NA, NA, ss_zr_rob$estimates, ss_zr_lech$estimates, ss_zr_zuers$estimates, NA, ss_zr_trins$estimates, NA),

Fruehling = c(NA, NA, ss_zr_rob_s_ges$estimates, NA, ss_zr_zuers_s_ges$estimates, NA, ss_zr_trins_s_ges$estimates, NA),

Winter = c(ss_zr_cav_w_ges$estimates, ss_zr_gruem_w_ges$estimates, ss_zr_rob_w_ges$estimates, ss_zr_lech_w_ges$estimates, NA, NA, NA, NA),

Schneeperiode_sub = c(NA, NA, NA, ss_zr_lech_sub$estimates, NA, NA, NA, NA),
                            
Fruehling_sub = c(NA, NA, ss_zr_rob_s_sub$estimates, NA, NA, NA, ss_zr_trins_s_sub$estimates, NA),
                            
Winter_sub = c(NA, NA, NA, NA, NA, NA, NA, NA))

library(gt)

gt(zr_hs_table) |>
  tab_header(title = "Sen Slope SchÃ¤tzer der Nullwerte der SchneehÃ¶he fÃ¼r den gesamten Beobachtungszeitraum und den Subsetzeitraum")|> 
  cols_label(Fluss = "Station", Schneeperiode ="Schneeperiode", Fruehling = "FrÃ¼hling", Winter = "Winter", Schneeperiode_sub = "Schneeperiode_sub",  Fruehling_sub = "FrÃ¼hling_sub", Winter_sub = "Winter_sub")

#plots
library(ggplot2)

#Gesamter Zeitraum

#Robbia

y_wert <- median(zero_ratio_robbia$hs, na.rm = TRUE) -
            ss_zr_rob$estimates * median(zero_ratio_robbia$h_year, na.rm = TRUE)


plot_zr_robbia_ges <- ggplot(zero_ratio_robbia,
       aes(x = h_year, y = hs)) +
  geom_col(fill = "grey70") +  geom_abline(
    slope = ss_zr_rob$estimates,
    intercept = y_wert,
    colour = "red",
    linewidth = 0.8
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Nullwerte in Robbia",
    x = "Jahr",
    y = "Anzahl der Nullwerte",
    color = "Jahr"
  ) +
  annotate(
  "text",
  x = 1978,
  y = max(zero_ratio_robbia$hs +4, na.rm = TRUE),
  label = paste0(
    "Trend pro Zeiteinheit: ",
    round(ss_zr_rob$estimates, 3),
    " Tage"
  )
) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +                 
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1), 
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold")
  )


#Lech

y_wert <- median(zero_ratio_lech$hs, na.rm = TRUE) -
            ss_zr_lech$estimates * median(zero_ratio_lech$h_year, na.rm = TRUE)


plot_zr_lech_ges <- ggplot(zero_ratio_lech,
       aes(x = h_year, y = hs)) +
  geom_col(fill = "grey70") +  geom_abline(
    slope = ss_zr_lech$estimates,
    intercept = y_wert,
    colour = "red",
    linewidth = 0.8
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Nullwerte in Lech",
    x = "Jahr",
    y = "Anzahl der Nullwerte",
    color = "Jahr"
  ) +
  annotate(
  "text",
  x = 1981,
  y = max(zero_ratio_lech$hs +2, na.rm = TRUE),
  label = paste0(
    "Trend pro Zeiteinheit: ",
    round(ss_zr_lech$estimates, 3),
    " Tage"
  )
) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +                 
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1), 
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold")
  )

#ZÃ¼rs 

y_wert <- median(zero_ratio_zuers$hs, na.rm = TRUE) -
            ss_zr_zuers$estimates * median(zero_ratio_zuers$h_year, na.rm = TRUE)


plot_zr_zuers_ges <- ggplot(zero_ratio_zuers,
       aes(x = h_year, y = hs)) +
  geom_col(fill = "grey70") +  geom_abline(
    slope = ss_zr_zuers$estimates,
    intercept = y_wert,
    colour = "red",
    linewidth = 0.8
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Nullwerte in ZÃ¼rs",
    x = "Jahr",
    y = "Anzahl der Nullwerte",
    color = "Jahr"
  ) +
  annotate(
  "text",
  x = 1981,
  y = max(zero_ratio_zuers$hs, na.rm = TRUE),
  label = paste0(
    "Trend pro Zeiteinheit: ",
    round(ss_zr_zuers$estimates, 3),
    " Tage"
  )
) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +                 
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1), 
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold")
  )

#Trins 

y_wert <- median(zero_ratio_trins$hs, na.rm = TRUE) -
            ss_zr_trins$estimates * median(zero_ratio_trins$h_year, na.rm = TRUE)


plot_zr_trins_ges <- ggplot(zero_ratio_trins,
       aes(x = h_year, y = hs)) +
  geom_col(fill = "grey70") +  geom_abline(
    slope = ss_zr_trins$estimates,
    intercept = y_wert,
    colour = "red",
    linewidth = 0.8
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Nullwerte in Trins",
    x = "Jahr",
    y = "Anzahl der Nullwerte",
    color = "Jahr"
  ) +
  annotate(
  "text",
  x = 1981,
  y = max(zero_ratio_trins$hs +6, na.rm = TRUE),
  label = paste0(
    "Trend pro Zeiteinheit: ",
    round(ss_zr_trins$estimates, 3),
    " Tage"
  )
) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +                 
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1), 
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold")
  )

library(patchwork)

plot_zr_ges <- (plot_zr_robbia_ges + plot_zr_lech_ges + plot_zr_zuers_ges + plot_zr_trins_ges) + plot_layout(ncol = 2) + plot_annotation (title = "Nullwertezeitreihen aller signifikanten Stationen", subtitle = "In der Schneeperiode im Beobachtungszeitraum", theme = theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 24, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5 ), plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold")))

ggsave("C:/Users/maggi/OneDrive/Studium/7_Semster/BA/Dat/Plots/zr_ges.png", plot = plot_zr_ges, width = 14, height = 10, dpi = 300, bg = "white")

#FrÃ¼hling

#Robbia

library(ggplot2)

y_wert <- median(zero_ratio_robbia_s_ges$hs, na.rm = TRUE) -
            ss_zr_rob_s_ges$estimates * median(zero_ratio_robbia_s_ges$h_year, na.rm = TRUE)


plot_zr_robbia_ges_s <- ggplot(zero_ratio_robbia_s_ges,
       aes(x = h_year, y = hs)) +
  geom_col(fill = "grey70") +  geom_abline(
    slope = ss_zr_rob_s_ges$estimates,
    intercept = y_wert,
    colour = "red",
    linewidth = 0.8
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Nullwerte in Robbia",
    x = "Jahr",
    y = "Anzahl der Nullwerte",
    color = "Jahr"
  ) +
  
  annotate(
  "text",
  x = 1978,
  y = max(zero_ratio_robbia_s_ges$hs +4, na.rm = TRUE),
  label = paste0(
    "Trend pro Zeiteinheit: ",
    round(ss_zr_rob_s_ges$estimates, 3),
    " Tage"
  )
) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +                 
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1), 
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold")
  )

#ZÃ¼rs 

y_wert <- median(zero_ratio_zuers_s_ges$hs, na.rm = TRUE) -
            ss_zr_zuers_s_ges$estimates * median(zero_ratio_zuers_s_ges$h_year, na.rm = TRUE)


plot_zr_zuers_ges_s <- ggplot(zero_ratio_zuers_s_ges,
       aes(x = h_year, y = hs)) +
  geom_col(fill = "grey70") +  geom_abline(
    slope = ss_zr_zuers_s_ges$estimates,
    intercept = y_wert,
    colour = "red",
    linewidth = 0.8
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Nullwerte in ZÃ¼rs",
    x = "Jahr",
    y = "Anzahl der Nullwerte",
    color = "Jahr"
  ) +
  annotate(
  "text",
  x = 1981,
  y = max(zero_ratio_zuers_s_ges$hs, na.rm = TRUE),
  label = paste0(
    "Trend pro Zeiteinheit: ",
    round(ss_zr_lech_s_ges$estimates, 3),
    " Tage"
  )
) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +                 
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1), 
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold")
  )

#Trins 

y_wert <- median(zero_ratio_trins_s_ges$hs, na.rm = TRUE) -
            ss_zr_trins_s_ges$estimates * median(zero_ratio_trins_s_ges$h_year, na.rm = TRUE)


plot_zr_trins_ges_s <- ggplot(zero_ratio_trins_s_ges,
       aes(x = h_year, y = hs)) +
  geom_col(fill = "grey70") +  geom_abline(
    slope = ss_zr_trins_s_ges$estimates,
    intercept = y_wert,
    colour = "red",
    linewidth = 0.8
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Nullwerte in Trins",
    x = "Jahr",
    y = "Anzahl der Nullwerte",
    color = "Jahr"
  ) +
  annotate(
  "text",
  x = 1981,
  y = max(zero_ratio_trins_s_ges$hs, na.rm = TRUE),
  label = paste0(
    "Trend pro Zeiteinheit: ",
    round(ss_zr_trins_s_ges$estimates, 3),
    " Tage"
  )
) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +                 
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1), 
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold")
  )

library(patchwork)
library(ggplot2)

plot_zr_ges_s <- (plot_zr_robbia_ges_s + plot_zr_zuers_ges_s + plot_zr_trins_ges_s) + plot_layout(ncol = 2) + plot_annotation (title = "Nullertezeitreihen aller signifikanten Stationen", subtitle = "Im FrÃ¼hling im Beobachtungszeitraum", theme = theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 24, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5 ), plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold")))


ggsave("C:/Users/maggi/OneDrive/Studium/7_Semster/BA/Dat/Plots/zr_s.png", plot = plot_zr_ges_s, width = 14, height = 10, dpi = 300, bg = "white")


#winter

#Cavaglia


  

y_wert <- median(zero_ratio_cavaglia_w_ges$hs, na.rm = TRUE) -
            ss_zr_cav_w_ges$estimates * median(zero_ratio_cavaglia_w_ges$hyear, na.rm = TRUE)


plot_zr_cavaglia_ges_w <- ggplot(zero_ratio_cavaglia_w_ges,
       aes(x = hyear, y = hs)) +
  geom_col(fill = "grey70") +  geom_abline(
    slope = ss_zr_cav_w_ges$estimates,
    intercept = y_wert,
    colour = "red",
    linewidth = 0.8
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Nullwerte in Cavaglia",
    x = "Jahr",
    y = "Anzahl der Nullwerte",
    color = "Jahr"
  ) +
  annotate(
  "text",
  x = 1973,
  y = max(zero_ratio_cavaglia_w_ges$hs, na.rm = TRUE),
  label = paste0(
    "Trend pro Zeiteinheit: ",
    round(ss_zr_cav_w_ges$estimates, 3),
    " Tage"
  )
) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +                 
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1), 
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold")
  )

#Alp GrÃ¼m
y_wert <- median(zero_ratio_gruem_w_ges$hs, na.rm = TRUE) -
            ss_zr_gruem_w_ges$estimates * median(zero_ratio_gruem_w_ges$hyear, na.rm = TRUE)


plot_zr_gruem_ges_w <- ggplot(zero_ratio_gruem_w_ges,
       aes(x = hyear, y = hs)) +
  geom_col(fill = "grey70") +  geom_abline(
    slope = ss_zr_gruem_w_ges$estimates,
    intercept = y_wert,
    colour = "red",
    linewidth = 0.8
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Nullwerte auf der Alp GrÃ¼m",
    x = "Jahr",
    y = "Anzahl der Nullwerte",
    color = "Jahr"
  ) +
  annotate(
  "text",
  x = 1977,
  y = max(zero_ratio_gruem_w_ges$hs, na.rm = TRUE),
  label = paste0(
    "Trend pro Zeiteinheit: ",
    round(ss_zr_gruem_w_ges$estimates, 3),
    " Tage"
  )
) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +                 
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1), 
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold")
  )
#Robbia

y_wert <- median(zero_ratio_robbia_w_ges$hs, na.rm = TRUE) -
            ss_zr_rob_w_ges$estimates * median(zero_ratio_robbia_w_ges$h_year, na.rm = TRUE)


plot_zr_robbia_ges_w <- ggplot(zero_ratio_robbia_w_ges,
       aes(x = h_year, y = hs)) +
  geom_col(fill = "grey70") +  geom_abline(
    slope = ss_zr_rob_w_ges$estimates,
    intercept = y_wert,
    colour = "red",
    linewidth = 0.8
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Nullwerte in Robbia",
    x = "Jahr",
    y = "Anzahl der Nullwerte",
    color = "Jahr"
  ) +
  
  annotate(
  "text",
  x = 1977,
  y = max(zero_ratio_robbia_w_ges$hs +4, na.rm = TRUE),
  label = paste0(
    "Trend pro Zeiteinheit: ",
    round(ss_zr_rob_w_ges$estimates, 3),
    " Tage"
  )
) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +                 
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1), 
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold")
  )
#Lech

y_wert <- median(zero_ratio_lech_w_ges$hs, na.rm = TRUE) -
            ss_zr_lech_w_ges$estimates * median(zero_ratio_lech_w_ges$h_year, na.rm = TRUE)


plot_zr_lech_ges_w <- ggplot(zero_ratio_lech_w_ges,
       aes(x = h_year, y = hs)) +
  geom_col(fill = "grey70") +  geom_abline(
    slope = ss_zr_lech_w_ges$estimates,
    intercept = y_wert,
    colour = "red",
    linewidth = 0.8
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Nullwerte in Lech",
    x = "Jahr",
    y = "Anzahl der Nullwerte",
    color = "Jahr"
  ) +
   annotate(
  "text",
  x = 1987,
  y = max(zero_ratio_lech_w_ges$hs, na.rm = TRUE),
  label = paste0(
    "Trend pro Zeiteinheit: ",
    round(ss_zr_lech_w_ges$estimates, 3),
    " Tage"
  )
) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +                 
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1), 
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold")
  )

library(patchwork)
plot_zr_ges_w <- (plot_zr_cavaglia_ges_w + plot_zr_gruem_ges_w + plot_zr_robbia_ges_w + plot_zr_lech_ges_w) + plot_layout(ncol = 2) + plot_annotation (title = "Nullwertezeitreihen aller signifikanten Stationen", subtitle = "Im Winter fÃ¼r den Beobachtungszeitraum", theme = theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 24, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5 ), plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold")))


ggsave("C:/Users/maggi/OneDrive/Studium/7_Semster/BA/Dat/Plots/zr_w.png", plot = plot_zr_ges_w, width = 14, height = 10, dpi = 300, bg = "white")

#Subsetzeitraum

#Lech
y_wert <- median(zero_ratio_lech_sub$hs, na.rm = TRUE) -
            ss_zr_lech_sub$estimates * median(zero_ratio_lech_sub$h_year, na.rm = TRUE)


plot_zr_lech_sub <- ggplot(zero_ratio_lech_sub,
       aes(x = h_year, y = hs)) +
  geom_col(fill = "grey70") +  geom_abline(
    slope = ss_zr_lech_sub$estimates,
    intercept = y_wert,
    colour = "red",
    linewidth = 0.8
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Nullwerte in Lech",
    subtitle = "In der Schneeperiode im Vergleichszeitraum (1992 - 2022)",
    x = "Jahr",
    y = "Anzahl der Nullwerte",
    color = "Jahr"
  ) +
  annotate(
  "text",
  x = 1995,
  y = max(zero_ratio_lech_sub$hs, na.rm = TRUE),
  label = paste0(
    "Trend pro Zeiteinheit: ",
    round(ss_zr_lech_sub$estimates, 3),
    " Tage"
  )
) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +                 
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1), 
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold"), plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold")
  )


ggsave("C:/Users/maggi/OneDrive/Studium/7_Semster/BA/Dat/Plots/lech_zr_sub.png", plot = plot_zr_lech_sub, width = 14, height = 10, dpi = 300, bg = "white")

#FrÃ¼hling


#Robbia

y_wert <- median(zero_ratio_robbia_s_sub$hs, na.rm = TRUE) -
            ss_zr_rob_s_sub$estimates * median(zero_ratio_robbia_s_sub$h_year, na.rm = TRUE)


plot_zr_robbia_sub_s <- ggplot(zero_ratio_robbia_s_sub,
       aes(x = h_year, y = hs)) +
  geom_col(fill = "grey70") +  geom_abline(
    slope = ss_zr_rob_s_sub$estimates,
    intercept = y_wert,
    colour = "red",
    linewidth = 0.8
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Nullwerte in Robbia im FrÃ¼hling",
    x = "Jahr",
    y = "Anzahl der Nullwerte",
    color = "Jahr"
  ) +
  annotate(
  "text",
  x = 2000,
  y = max(zero_ratio_robbia_s_sub$hs +6, na.rm = TRUE),
  label = paste0(
    "Trend pro Zeiteinheit: ",
    round(ss_zr_rob_s_sub$estimates, 3),
    " Tage"
  )
) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +                 
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1), 
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold")
  )


#Trins 

y_wert <- median(zero_ratio_trins_s_sub$hs, na.rm = TRUE) -
            ss_zr_trins_s_sub$estimates * median(zero_ratio_trins_s_sub$h_year, na.rm = TRUE)


plot_zr_trins_sub_s <- ggplot(zero_ratio_trins_s_sub,
       aes(x = h_year, y = hs)) +
  geom_col(fill = "grey70") +  geom_abline(
    slope = ss_zr_trins_s_sub$estimates,
    intercept = y_wert,
    colour = "red",
    linewidth = 0.8
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Nullwerte in Trins im FrÃ¼hjahr",
    x = "Jahr",
    y = "Anzahl der Nullwerte",
    color = "Jahr"
  ) +
  annotate(
  "text",
  x = 1998,
  y = max(zero_ratio_trins_s_sub$hs, na.rm = TRUE),
  label = paste0(
    "Trend pro Zeiteinheit: ",
    round(ss_zr_trins_s_sub$estimates, 3),
    " Tage"
  )
) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +                 
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1), 
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold")
  )


library(patchwork)
plot_zr_sub_s <- (plot_zr_robbia_sub_s + plot_zr_trins_sub_s ) + plot_layout(ncol = 2) + plot_annotation (title = "Nullwertezeitreihen aller signifikanten Stationen", subtitle = "Im FrÃ¼hjahr im Vergleichszeitraum (1992 - 2022)", theme = theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 24, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5 ), plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold")))


ggsave("C:/Users/maggi/OneDrive/Studium/7_Semster/BA/Dat/Plots/zr_s_sub.png", plot = plot_zr_sub_s, width = 14, height = 10, dpi = 300, bg = "white")
```
