```{r Graphische Darstellung die IntensitÃ¤t und die Nullwerte des SWE fÃ¼r den subset und den gesamten Zeitraum, Winter und FrÃ¼hling}
ss_cav_in_SWE_1 <- ss_cav_in_SWE$estimates *242
ss_gruem_in_SWE_1 <- ss_gruem_in_SWE$estimates *242
ss_rob_in_SWE_1 <- ss_rob_in_SWE$estimates*242
ss_lech_in_SWE_1 <- ss_lech_in_SWE$estimates*242
ss_zuers_in_SWE_1 <- ss_zuers_in_SWE$estimates*242
ss_zug_in_SWE_1 <- ss_zug_in_SWE$estimates *242
ss_trins_in_SWE_1 <- ss_trins_in_SWE$estimates*242
ss_gsch_in_SWE_1 <- ss_gsch_in_SWE$estimates*242

ss_cav_in_SWE_1_s_ges <- ss_cav_in_SWE_s_ges$estimates*122
ss_gruem_in_SWE_1_s_ges <- ss_gruem_in_SWE_s_ges$estimates*122
ss_rob_in_SWE_1_s_ges <- ss_rob_in_SWE_s_ges$estimates*122
ss_lech_in_SWE_1_s_ges <- ss_lech_in_SWE_s_ges$estimates*122
ss_zuers_in_SWE_1_s_ges <- ss_zuers_in_SWE_s_ges$estimates*122
ss_zug_in_SWE_1_s_ges <- ss_zug_in_SWE_s_ges$estimates*122
ss_trins_in_SWE_1_s_ges <- ss_trins_in_SWE_s_ges$estimates*122
ss_gsch_in_SWE_1_s_ges <- ss_gsch_in_SWE_s_ges$estimates*122

ss_cav_in_SWE_1_w_ges <- ss_cav_in_SWE_w_ges$estimates*120
ss_gruem_in_SWE_1_w_ges <- ss_gruem_in_SWE_w_ges$estimates*120
ss_rob_in_SWE_1_w_ges <- ss_rob_in_SWE_w_ges$estimates*120
ss_lech_in_SWE_1_w_ges <- ss_lech_in_SWE_w_ges$estimates*120
ss_zuers_in_SWE_1_w_ges <- ss_zuers_in_SWE_w_ges$estimates*120
ss_zug_in_SWE_1_w_ges <- ss_zug_in_SWE_w_ges$estimates*120
ss_trins_in_SWE_1_w_ges <- ss_trins_in_SWE_w_ges$estimates*120
ss_gsch_in_SWE_1_w_ges <- ss_gsch_in_SWE_w_ges$estimates*120

ss_cav_in_SWE_1_sub <- ss_cav_in_SWE_sub$estimates *242
ss_gruem_in_SWE_1_sub <- ss_gruem_in_SWE_sub$estimates *242
ss_rob_in_SWE_1_sub <- ss_rob_in_SWE_sub$estimates*242
ss_lech_in_SWE_1_sub <- ss_lech_in_SWE_sub$estimates*242
ss_zuers_in_SWE_1_sub <- ss_zuers_in_SWE_sub$estimates*242
ss_zug_in_SWE_1_sub <- ss_zug_in_SWE_sub$estimates *242
ss_trins_in_SWE_1_sub <- ss_trins_in_SWE_sub$estimates*242
ss_gsch_in_SWE_1_sub <- ss_gsch_in_SWE_sub$estimates*242

ss_cav_in_SWE_1_s_sub <- ss_cav_in_SWE_s_sub$estimates*122
ss_gruem_in_SWE_1_s_sub <- ss_gruem_in_SWE_s_sub$estimates*122
ss_rob_in_SWE_1_s_sub <- ss_rob_in_SWE_s_sub$estimates*122
ss_lech_in_SWE_1_s_sub <- ss_lech_in_SWE_s_sub$estimates*122
ss_zuers_in_SWE_1_s_sub <- ss_zuers_in_SWE_s_sub$estimates*122
ss_zug_in_SWE_1_s_sub <- ss_zug_in_SWE_s_sub$estimates*122
ss_trins_in_SWE_1_s_sub <- ss_trins_in_SWE_s_sub$estimates*122
ss_gsch_in_SWE_1_s_sub <- ss_gsch_in_SWE_s_sub$estimates*122

ss_cav_in_SWE_1_w_sub <- ss_cav_in_SWE_w_sub$estimates*120
ss_gruem_in_SWE_1_w_sub <- ss_gruem_in_SWE_w_sub$estimates*120
ss_rob_in_SWE_1_w_sub <- ss_rob_in_SWE_w_sub$estimates*120
ss_lech_in_SWE_1_w_sub <- ss_lech_in_SWE_w_sub$estimates*120
ss_zuers_in_SWE_1_w_sub <- ss_zuers_in_SWE_w_sub$estimates*120
ss_zug_in_SWE_1_w_sub <- ss_zug_in_SWE_w_sub$estimates*120
ss_trins_in_SWE_1_w_sub <- ss_trins_in_SWE_w_sub$estimates*120
ss_gsch_in_SWE_1_w_sub <- ss_gsch_in_SWE_w_sub$estimates*120


print(ss_zr_cav_SWE) #ns
print(ss_zr_gruem_SWE) #ns
print(ss_zr_rob_SWE)#s
print(ss_zr_lech_SWE)#s
print(ss_zr_zuers_SWE)#s
print(ss_zr_zug_SWE)#ns
print(ss_zr_trins_SWE)#s
print(ss_zr_gsch_SWE)#ns

print(ss_zr_cav_SWE_s_ges)#ns
print(ss_zr_gruem_SWE_s_ges)#ns
print(ss_zr_rob_SWE_s_ges)#s
print(ss_zr_lech_SWE_s_ges)#ns
print(ss_zr_zuers_SWE_s_ges)#s
print(ss_zr_zug_SWE_s_ges)#ns
print(ss_zr_trins_SWE_s_ges)#s
print(ss_zr_gsch_SWE_s_ges)#ns

print(ss_zr_cav_SWE_w_ges)#s
print(ss_zr_gruem_SWE_w_ges)#s
print(ss_zr_rob_SWE_w_ges)#s
print(ss_zr_lech_SWE_w_ges)#s
print(ss_zr_zuers_SWE_w_ges)#ns
print(ss_zr_zug_SWE_w_ges)#ns
print(ss_zr_trins_SWE_w_ges)#ns
print(ss_zr_gsch_SWE_w_ges)#ns

print(ss_zr_cav_SWE_sub) #ns
print(ss_zr_gruem_SWE_sub)  #ns
print(ss_zr_rob_SWE_sub)#ns
print(ss_zr_lech_SWE_sub)#s
print(ss_zr_zuers_SWE_sub)#ns
print(ss_zr_zug_SWE_sub)#ns
print(ss_zr_trins_SWE_sub)#ns
print(ss_zr_gsch_SWE_sub)#ns

print(ss_zr_cav_SWE_s_sub)#ns
print(ss_zr_gruem_SWE_s_sub) #ns
print(ss_zr_rob_SWE_s_sub)#s
print(ss_zr_lech_SWE_s_sub)#ns
print(ss_zr_zuers_SWE_s_sub)#ns
print(ss_zr_zug_SWE_s_sub)#ns
print(ss_zr_trins_SWE_s_sub)#s
print(ss_zr_gsch_SWE_s_sub)#ns

print(ss_zr_cav_SWE_w_sub)#ns
print(ss_zr_gruem_SWE_w_sub)#ns
print(ss_zr_rob_SWE_w_sub)#ns
print(ss_zr_lech_SWE_w_sub)#ns
print(ss_zr_zuers_SWE_w_sub)#ns
print(ss_zr_zug_SWE_w_sub)#ns
print(ss_zr_trins_SWE_w_sub)#ns
print(ss_zr_gsch_SWE_w_sub)#ns




#Tabellen

in_SWE_table <- data.frame(Fluss = c("Cavaglia","Alp GrÃ¼m", "Robbia", "Lech", "Zuers", "Zug", "Trins","Gschnitz"),
                                 
Schneeperiode = c(ss_cav_in_SWE_1 %>% round(3) , ss_gruem_in_SWE_1 %>% round(3), ss_rob_in_SWE_1 %>% round(3), NA, ss_zuers_in_SWE_1 %>% round(3), ss_zug_in_SWE_1 %>% round(3), ss_trins_in_SWE_1 %>% round(3), ss_gsch_in_SWE_1 %>% round(3)),

Fruehling = c(ss_cav_in_SWE_1_s_ges %>% round(3), ss_gruem_in_SWE_1_s_ges %>% round(3), ss_rob_in_SWE_1_s_ges %>% round(3), NA, ss_zuers_in_SWE_1_s_ges %>% round(3), NA, ss_trins_in_SWE_1_s_ges %>% round(3), ss_gsch_in_SWE_1_s_ges %>% round(3)),

Winter = c(ss_cav_in_SWE_1_w_ges %>% round(3), ss_gruem_in_SWE_1_w_ges %>% round(3), ss_rob_in_SWE_1_w_ges %>% round(3), NA, ss_zuers_in_SWE_1_w_ges %>% round(3), ss_zug_in_SWE_1_w_ges %>% round(3), ss_trins_in_SWE_1_w_ges %>% round(3), ss_gsch_in_SWE_1_w_ges %>% round(3)),

Schneeperiode_sub = c(NA, NA, ss_rob_in_SWE_1_sub %>% round(3), ss_lech_in_SWE_1_sub %>% round(3), NA, ss_zug_in_SWE_1_sub %>% round(3), ss_trins_in_SWE_1_sub %>% round(3), ss_gsch_in_SWE_1_sub %>% round(3)),
                            
Fruehling_sub = c(NA, ss_gruem_in_SWE_1_s_sub %>% round(3), NA, NA, ss_zuers_in_SWE_1_s_sub %>% round(3), NA, NA, ss_gsch_in_SWE_1_s_ges %>% round(3)),
                            
Winter_sub = c(ss_cav_in_SWE_1_w_sub %>% round(3), ss_gruem_in_SWE_1_w_sub %>% round(3), NA, ss_lech_in_SWE_1_w_sub %>% round(3), NA, ss_zug_in_SWE_1_w_sub %>% round(3), ss_trins_in_SWE_1_w_sub %>% round(3), ss_gsch_in_SWE_1_w_sub %>% round(3)))

library(gt)

in_table_SWE <- gt(in_SWE_table) |>
  tab_header(title = "Sen's Slope SchÃ¤tzer der IntensitÃ¤t des SWEs fÃ¼r den gesamten Beobachtungszeitraum und im Vergleichszeitraum")|> 
  cols_label(Fluss = "Station", Schneeperiode ="Schneeperiode", Fruehling = "FrÃ¼hling", Winter = "Winter", Schneeperiode_sub = "Schneeperiode_sub",  Fruehling_sub = "FrÃ¼hling_sub", Winter_sub = "Winter_sub")

gtsave(in_table_SWE,
  "C:/Users/maggi/OneDrive/Studium/7_Semster/BA/Dat/Plots/in_table_SWE.png")



zr_SWE_table <- data.frame(Fluss = c("Cavaglia","Alp GrÃ¼m", "Robbia", "Lech", "Zuers", "Zug", "Trins","Gschnitz"),
                                 
Schneeperiode = c(NA, NA, ss_zr_rob_SWE$estimates, ss_zr_lech_SWE$estimates, ss_zr_zuers_SWE$estimates, NA, ss_zr_trins_SWE$estimates, NA),

Fruehling = c(NA, NA, ss_zr_rob_SWE_s_ges$estimates, NA, ss_zr_zuers_SWE_s_ges$estimates, NA, ss_zr_trins_SWE_s_ges$estimates, NA),

Winter = c(ss_zr_cav_SWE_w_ges$estimates, ss_zr_gruem_SWE_w_ges$estimates, ss_zr_rob_SWE_w_ges$estimates, ss_zr_lech_w_ges$estimates, NA, NA, NA, NA),

Schneeperiode_sub = c(NA, NA, NA, ss_zr_lech_SWE_sub$estimates, NA, NA, NA, NA),
                            
Fruehling_sub = c(NA, NA, ss_zr_rob_s_sub$estimates, NA, NA, NA, ss_zr_trins_s_sub$estimates, NA),
                            
Winter_sub = c(NA, NA, NA, NA, NA, NA, NA, NA))

library(gt)

gt(zr_SWE_table) |>
  tab_header(title = "Sen's Slope SchÃ¤tzer der Nullwerte des SWEs fÃ¼r den gesamten Beobachtungszeitraum und den Subsetzeitraum")|> 
  cols_label(Fluss = "Station", Schneeperiode ="Schneeperiode", Fruehling = "FrÃ¼hling", Winter = "Winter", Schneeperiode_sub = "Schneeperiode_sub",  Fruehling_sub = "FrÃ¼hling_sub", Winter_sub = "Winter_sub")

#IntensitÃ¤ts plots (Beispiele der StÃ¤rksten)

#Gesamter Zeitraum
library(dplyr)
library(lubridate)

robbia_in_SWE_s_ges <- robbia_in_SWE_s_ges %>%
  mutate(
    Jahr = year(date),
    Tag = yday(date)
  )

y_wert <- median(robbia_in_SWE_s_ges$SWE, na.rm = TRUE) -
             ss_rob_in_SWE_s_ges$estimates * median(robbia_in_SWE_s_ges$Tag, na.rm = TRUE)

ggplot(robbia_in_SWE_s_ges,
       aes(x = Tag , y = SWE,
           group = Jahr)) +
  geom_line(colour = "grey") +  geom_abline(
    slope = ss_rob_in_SWE_s_ges$estimates,
    intercept = y_wert,
    colour = "red",
    linewidth = 1.2
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "SWE in Robbia im FrÃ¼hling",
    x = "Tag des Jahres",
    y = "SWE in mm",
    color = "Jahr"
  ) +
  annotate(
  "text",
  x = 100,
  y = max(robbia_in_SWE_s_ges$SWE, na.rm = TRUE),
  label = paste0(
    "Trend Ã¼ber den gesamten FrÃ¼hling pro Jahr: ",
    round(ss_rob_in_SWE_1_s_ges, 3),
    " mm"
  )
) +
  theme_minimal()

#Gschnitz

gsch_in_SWE_s_ges <- gsch_in_SWE_s_ges %>%
  mutate(
    Jahr = year(date),
    Tag = yday(date)
  )

y_wert <- median(gsch_in_SWE_s_ges$SWE, na.rm = TRUE) -
             ss_gsch_in_SWE_s_ges$estimates * median(gsch_in_SWE_s_ges$Tag, na.rm = TRUE)

ggplot(gsch_in_SWE_s_ges,
       aes(x = Tag, y = SWE,
           group = Jahr)) +
  geom_line(colour = "grey") +  geom_abline(
    slope = ss_gsch_in_SWE_s_ges$estimates,
    intercept = y_wert,
    colour = "red",
    linewidth = 1.2
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "SWE in Gschnitz im FrÃ¼hling",
    x = "Tag des Jahres",
    y = "SWE in mm",
    color = "Jahr"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()

```

```{r Graphische monatliche Sen Slope fÃ¼r den Abfluss}
sen_Q_leprese_november_ges <- sen_Q_leprese_november_ges$estimates * 31
sen_Q_Lech_november_ges <- sen_Q_Lech_november_ges$estimates *31
sen_Q_Gschnitzbach_november_ges <- sen_Q_Gschnitzbach_november_ges$estimates * 31

sen_Q_leprese_dezember_ges <- sen_Q_leprese_dezember_ges$estimates *30
sen_Q_Lech_dezember_ges <- sen_Q_Lech_dezember_ges$estimates *30
sen_Q_Gschnitzbach_dezember_ges <- sen_Q_Gschnitzbach_dezember_ges$estimates *30

sen_Q_leprese_januar_ges <- sen_Q_leprese_januar_ges$estimates * 31
sen_Q_Lech_januar_ges <- sen_Q_Lech_januar_ges$estimates *31
sen_Q_Gschnitzbach_januar_ges <- sen_Q_Gschnitzbach_januar_ges$estimates *31


sen_Q_leprese_februar_ges <- sen_Q_leprese_februar_ges$estimates *28
sen_Q_Lech_februar_ges <- sen_Q_Lech_februar_ges$estimates *28
sen_Q_Gschnitzbach_februar_ges<- sen_Q_Gschnitzbach_februar_ges$estimates *28

sen_Q_leprese_maerz_ges <- sen_Q_leprese_maerz_ges$estimates *28
sen_Q_Lech_maerz_ges <- sen_Q_Lech_maerz_ges$estimates *28
sen_Q_Gschnitzbach_maerz_ges <- sen_Q_Gschnitzbach_maerz_ges$estimates *28

sen_Q_leprese_april_ges <- sen_Q_leprese_april_ges$estimates * 30
sen_Q_Lech_april_ges <- sen_Q_Lech_april_ges$estimates *30
sen_Q_Gschnitzbach_april_ges <- sen_Q_Gschnitzbach_april_ges$estimates * 30

sen_Q_leprese_mai_ges <- sen_Q_leprese_mai_ges$estimates *31
sen_Q_Lech_mai_ges <- sen_Q_Lech_mai_ges$estimates *31
sen_Q_Gschnitzbach_mai_ges <- sen_Q_Gschnitzbach_mai_ges$estimates *31

sen_Q_leprese_juni_ges <- sen_Q_leprese_juni_ges$estimates *30
sen_Q_Lech_juni_ges <- sen_Q_Lech_juni_ges$estimates *30
sen_Q_Gschnitzbach_juni_ges <- sen_Q_Gschnitzbach_juni_ges$estimates *30

sen_Q_leprese_november_sub <- sen_Q_leprese_november_sub$estimates * 31
sen_Q_Lech_november_sub <- sen_Q_Lech_november_sub$estimates *31
sen_Q_Gschnitzbach_november_sub <- sen_Q_Gschnitzbach_november_sub$estimates * 31

sen_Q_leprese_dezember_sub <- sen_Q_leprese_dezember_sub$estimates *30
sen_Q_Lech_dezember_sub <- sen_Q_Lech_dezember_sub$estimates *30
sen_Q_Gschnitzbach_dezember_sub <- sen_Q_Gschnitzbach_dezember_sub$estimates *30

sen_Q_leprese_januar_sub <- sen_Q_leprese_januar_sub$estimates * 31
sen_Q_Lech_januar_sub <- sen_Q_Lech_januar_sub$estimates *31
sen_Q_Gschnitzbach_januar_sub <- sen_Q_Gschnitzbach_januar_sub$estimates *31


sen_Q_leprese_februar_sub <- sen_Q_leprese_februar_sub$estimates *28
sen_Q_Lech_februar_sub <- sen_Q_Lech_februar_sub$estimates *28
sen_Q_Gschnitzbach_februar_sub<- sen_Q_Gschnitzbach_februar_sub$estimates *28

sen_Q_leprese_maerz_sub <- sen_Q_leprese_maerz_sub$estimates *28
sen_Q_Lech_maerz_sub <- sen_Q_Lech_maerz_sub$estimates *28
sen_Q_Gschnitzbach_maerz_sub <- sen_Q_Gschnitzbach_maerz_sub$estimates *28

sen_Q_leprese_april_sub <- sen_Q_leprese_april_sub$estimates * 30
sen_Q_Lech_april_sub <- sen_Q_Lech_april_sub$estimates *30
sen_Q_Gschnitzbach_april_sub <- sen_Q_Gschnitzbach_april_sub$estimates * 30

sen_Q_leprese_mai_sub <- sen_Q_leprese_mai_sub$estimates *31
sen_Q_Lech_mai_sub <- sen_Q_Lech_mai_sub$estimates *31
sen_Q_Gschnitzbach_mai_sub <- sen_Q_Gschnitzbach_mai_sub$estimates *31

sen_Q_leprese_juni_sub <- sen_Q_leprese_juni_sub$estimates *30
sen_Q_Lech_juni_sub <- sen_Q_Lech_juni_sub$estimates *30
sen_Q_Gschnitzbach_juni_sub <- sen_Q_Gschnitzbach_juni_sub$estimates *30


#Tabelle

abfluss_table_monatlich <- data.frame(Fluss = c("Poschiavino","Lech", "Gschnitzbach"),
                                    
November = c(sen_Q_leprese_november_ges %>% round(3) ,sen_Q_Lech_november_ges %>% round(3), sen_Q_Gschnitzbach_november_ges %>% round(3)),

Dezember = c(sen_Q_leprese_dezember_ges %>% round(3) ,NA, sen_Q_Gschnitzbach_dezember_ges %>% round(3)),

Januar = c(sen_Q_leprese_januar_ges %>% round(3) ,NA, sen_Q_Gschnitzbach_januar_ges %>% round(3)),

Februar = c(sen_Q_leprese_februar_ges %>% round(3) ,NA, sen_Q_Gschnitzbach_februar_ges %>% round(3)),
                            
Maerz = c(sen_Q_leprese_maerz_ges %>% round(3) ,sen_Q_Lech_maerz_ges %>% round(3), sen_Q_Gschnitzbach_maerz_ges %>% round(3)),
                            
April = c(sen_Q_leprese_april_ges %>% round(3), sen_Q_Lech_april_ges %>% round(3), sen_Q_Gschnitzbach_maerz_ges %>% round(3)),

Mai = c(sen_Q_leprese_mai_ges %>% round(3), sen_Q_Lech_mai_ges %>% round(3), sen_Q_Gschnitzbach_mai_ges %>% round(3)), 

Juni = c(sen_Q_leprese_juni_ges %>% round(3), sen_Q_Lech_juni_ges %>% round(3), NA),

November_sub = c(NA ,sen_Q_Lech_november_sub %>% round(3), NA),

Dezember_sub = c(sen_Q_leprese_dezember_sub %>% round(3) , NA, NA),

Januar_sub = c(NA , NA, NA),

Februar_sub = c(sen_Q_leprese_februar_sub %>% round(3) , NA, sen_Q_Gschnitzbach_februar_sub %>% round(3)),

Maerz_sub = c(NA ,sen_Q_Lech_maerz_sub %>% round(3), sen_Q_Gschnitzbach_maerz_sub %>% round(3)),
                            
April_sub = c(sen_Q_leprese_april_sub %>% round(3), sen_Q_Lech_april_sub %>% round(3), sen_Q_Gschnitzbach_maerz_sub %>% round(3)),

Mai_sub = c(sen_Q_leprese_mai_sub %>% round(3), NA, NA), 

Juni_sub = c(sen_Q_leprese_juni_sub %>% round(3), NA, NA))

library(gt)

abfluss_table_monatlich <- gt(abfluss_table_monatlich) |>
  tab_header(title = "Sen's Slope SchÃ¤tzer fÃ¼r den Abfluss fÃ¼r den gesamten Beobachtungszeitraum und im Vergleichszeitraum in der monatliche Betrachtung")|> 
  cols_label(Fluss = "Fluss", Dezember = "Dez.", November = "Nov.", Januar ="Jan.", Februar ="Feb.", Maerz = "MÃ¤r.", April = "Apr.", Mai = "Mai", Juni = "Jun.", November_sub = "Nov_sub", Dezember_sub = "Dez_sub", Januar_sub ="Jan_sub", Februar_sub ="Feb_sub", Maerz_sub = "MÃ¤r_sub", April_sub = "Apr_sub", Mai_sub = "Mai_sub", Juni_sub = "Juni_sub") |> tab_options(table.font.size = px(10))

gtsave(data = abfluss_table_monatlich,
  "C:/Users/maggi/OneDrive/Studium/7_Semster/BA/Dat/Plots/abfluss_table_monatlich.png")


```

```{r Graphische monatliche Darstellung fÃ¼r den und den Nullwertetest der SchneehÃ¶he}
print(ss_zr_cav_november_ges) #s
print(ss_zr_gruem_november_ges) #s
print(ss_zr_rob_november_ges) #s
print(ss_zr_lech_november_ges) #ns
print(ss_zr_zuers_november_ges) #ns
print(ss_zr_zug_november_ges) #ns
print(ss_zr_trins_november_ges) #ns
print(ss_zr_gsch_november_ges) #ns

print(ss_zr_cav_dezember_ges) #ns
print(ss_zr_gruem_dezember_ges) #s
print(ss_zr_rob_dezember_ges) #s
print(ss_zr_lech_dezember_ges) #s
print(ss_zr_zuers_dezember_ges) #ns
print(ss_zr_zug_dezember_ges) #ns
print(ss_zr_trins_dezember_ges) #ns
print(ss_zr_gsch_dezember_ges) #s

print(ss_zr_cav_januar_ges) #s
print(ss_zr_gruem_januar_ges) #ns
print(ss_zr_rob_januar_ges) #ns
print(ss_zr_lech_januar_ges) #NA
print(ss_zr_zuers_januar_ges) #NA
print(ss_zr_zug_januar_ges) #NA
print(ss_zr_trins_januar_ges) #ns
print(ss_zr_gsch_januar_ges) #ns

print(ss_zr_cav_februar_ges) #ns
print(ss_zr_gruem_februar_ges) #s
print(ss_zr_rob_februar_ges) #s
print(ss_zr_lech_februar_ges) #NA
print(ss_zr_zuers_februar_ges) #NA
print(ss_zr_zug_februar_ges) #NA
print(ss_zr_trins_februar_ges) #ns
print(ss_zr_gsch_februar_ges) #NA

print(ss_zr_cav_maerz_ges) #nicht signifikant
print(ss_zr_gruem_maerz_ges) #nicht signifikant
print(ss_zr_rob_maerz_ges) #signifikant
print(ss_zr_lech_maerz_ges) #nicht signifikant
print(ss_zr_zuers_maerz_ges) #NA
print(ss_zr_zug_maerz_ges) #NA
print(ss_zr_trins_maerz_ges) #nicht sig
print(ss_zr_gsch_maerz_ges) #nicht sig

print(ss_zr_cav_april_ges) #nicht sig
print(ss_zr_gruem_april_ges) #sig
print(ss_zr_rob_april_ges) #sig
print(ss_zr_lech_april_ges)  #nicht sig
print(ss_zr_zuers_april_ges) #nicht signif
print(ss_zr_zug_april_ges)  #nicht sig
print(ss_zr_trins_april_ges) #sig
print(ss_zr_gsch_april_ges) #nicht sig

print(ss_zr_cav_mai_ges) #nicht sig
print(ss_zr_gruem_mai_ges) #nicht sig
print(ss_zr_rob_mai_ges) #nicht sig
print(ss_zr_lech_mai_ges) # nicht sig
print(ss_zr_zuers_mai_ges) # sig
print(ss_zr_zug_mai_ges)  #nicht sig
print(ss_zr_trins_mai_ges)#sig
print(ss_zr_gsch_mai_ges) #nicht sig

print(ss_zr_cav_november_sub) #ns
print(ss_zr_gruem_november_sub) #ns
print(ss_zr_rob_november_sub) #ns
print(ss_zr_lech_november_sub) #ns
print(ss_zr_zuers_november_sub) #ns
print(ss_zr_zug_november_sub) #ns
print(ss_zr_trins_november_sub) #ns
print(ss_zr_gsch_november_sub) #ns

print(ss_zr_cav_dezember_sub) #ns
print(ss_zr_gruem_dezember_sub) #ns
print(ss_zr_rob_dezember_sub) #ns
print(ss_zr_lech_dezember_sub) #ns
print(ss_zr_zuers_dezember_sub) #ns
print(ss_zr_zug_dezember_sub) #ns
print(ss_zr_trins_dezember_sub) #ns
print(ss_zr_gsch_dezember_sub) #s

print(ss_zr_cav_januar_sub) #ns
print(ss_zr_gruem_januar_sub) #ns
print(ss_zr_rob_januar_sub) #s
print(ss_zr_lech_januar_sub) #NA
print(ss_zr_zuers_januar_sub) #NA
print(ss_zr_zug_januar_sub) #NA
print(ss_zr_trins_januar_sub) #ns
print(ss_zr_gsch_januar_sub) #ns

print(ss_zr_cav_februar_sub) #ns
print(ss_zr_gruem_februar_sub) #ns
print(ss_zr_rob_februar_sub) #ns
print(ss_zr_lech_februar_sub) #NA
print(ss_zr_zuers_februar_sub) #NA
print(ss_zr_zug_februar_sub) #NA
print(ss_zr_trins_februar_sub) #ns
print(ss_zr_gsch_februar_sub) #NA

print(ss_zr_cav_maerz_sub)#nicht sig
print(ss_zr_gruem_maerz_sub)# nicht sig
print(ss_zr_rob_maerz_sub) #nicht sig
print(ss_zr_lech_maerz_sub) #NA
print(ss_zr_zuers_maerz_sub)#NA
print(ss_zr_zug_maerz_sub) #NA
print(ss_zr_trins_maerz_sub) #nicht sig
print(ss_zr_gsch_maerz_sub)#nicht sig


print(ss_zr_cav_april_sub) #nicht sig
print(ss_zr_gruem_april_sub) #nicht sig
print(ss_zr_rob_april_sub) #nicht sig
print(ss_zr_lech_april_sub)#nicht sig
print(ss_zr_zuers_april_sub)  #nicht sig
print(ss_zr_zug_april_sub)#nicht sig
print(ss_zr_trins_april_sub) #sig
print(ss_zr_gsch_april_sub) #nicht sig

print(ss_zr_cav_mai_sub) #nicht sig
print(ss_zr_gruem_mai_sub)  #sig
print(ss_zr_rob_mai_sub) #nicht sig
print(ss_zr_lech_mai_sub) #nicht sig
print(ss_zr_zuers_mai_sub) #nicht sig
print(ss_zr_zug_mai_sub)#nicht sig
print(ss_zr_trins_mai_sub)# nicht sig
print(ss_zr_gsch_mai_sub) #nicht sig


#Tabelle

hs_table_monatlich <- data.frame(Fluss = c("Cavaglia","Alp GrÃ¼m", "Robbia", "Lech", "Zuers", "Zug", "Trins","Gschnitz"),
                                 
November = c(ss_zr_cav_november_ges$estimates, ss_zr_gruem_november_ges$estimates, ss_zr_rob_november_ges$estimates, NA, NA, NA, NA, NA),

Dezember = c(NA, ss_zr_gruem_dezember_ges$estimates, ss_zr_rob_dezember_ges$estimates, ss_zr_lech_dezember_ges$estimates, NA, NA, NA, ss_zr_gsch_dezember_ges$estimates),

Januar = c(ss_zr_cav_januar_ges$estimates, NA, NA, NA, NA, NA, NA, NA),

Februar = c(NA, ss_zr_gruem_februar_ges$estimates, ss_zr_rob_februar_ges$estimates, NA, NA, NA, NA, NA),
                            
Maerz = c(NA, NA, NA, NA, NA, NA, NA, NA),
                            
April = c(NA, ss_zr_gruem_april_ges$estimates, ss_zr_rob_april_ges$estimates, NA, NA, NA, ss_zr_trins_april_ges$estimates, NA),

Mai = c(NA, NA, NA, NA, ss_zr_zuers_mai_ges$estimates, NA, ss_zr_trins_mai_ges$estimates, NA), 

Juni = c(NA, NA, NA, NA, NA, NA, NA, NA),

November_sub = c(NA, NA, NA, NA, NA, NA, NA, NA),

Dezember_sub = c(NA, NA, NA, NA, NA, NA, NA, ss_zr_gsch_dezember_sub$estimates),

Januar_sub = c(NA, NA, ss_zr_rob_januar_sub$estimates, NA, NA, NA, NA, NA),

Februar_sub = c(NA, NA, NA, NA, NA, NA, NA, NA),

Maerz_sub = c(NA, NA, NA, NA, NA, NA, NA, NA),
                            
April_sub = c(NA, NA, NA, NA, NA, NA, NA, NA),

Mai_sub = c(NA, ss_zr_gruem_mai_ges$estimates, NA, NA, NA, NA, NA, NA), 

Juni_sub = c(NA, NA, NA, NA, NA, NA, NA, NA))

library(gt)

gt(hs_table_monatlich) |>
  tab_header(title = "Sen Slope SchÃ¤tzer die Nulwerte fÃ¼r den gesamten Beobachtungszeitraum und den Subsetzeitraum in der monatliche Betrachtung")|> 
  cols_label(Fluss = "Station", November ="November", Dezember = "Dezember", Januar = "Januar", Februar = "Februar",  Maerz = "MÃ¤rz", April = "April", Mai = "Mai", Juni = "Juni", November_sub = "November_sub", Dezember_sub = "Dezember_sub", Januar_sub = "Januar_sub", Februar_sub = "Februar_sub", Maerz_sub = "MÃ¤rz_sub", April_sub = "April_sub", Mai_sub = "Mai_sub", Juni_sub = "Juni_sub")

```

```{r Graphische monatliche Darstellung fÃ¼r das SWE mit IntensitÃ¤t und Nullwertetest}

print(ss_zr_cav_SWE_november_ges) #s
print(ss_zr_gruem_SWE_november_ges) #s
print(ss_zr_rob_SWE_november_ges)#s
print(ss_zr_lech_SWE_november_ges)#ns
print(ss_zr_zuers_SWE_november_ges)#ns
print(ss_zr_zug_SWE_november_ges)#ns
print(ss_zr_trins_SWE_november_ges)#ns
print(ss_zr_gsch_SWE_november_ges)#ns

print(ss_zr_cav_SWE_dezember_ges) #ns
print(ss_zr_gruem_SWE_dezember_ges) #s
print(ss_zr_rob_SWE_dezember_ges)#s
print(ss_zr_lech_SWE_dezember_ges)#s
print(ss_zr_zuers_SWE_dezember_ges)#ns
print(ss_zr_zug_SWE_dezember_ges)#ns
print(ss_zr_trins_SWE_dezember_ges)#ns
print(ss_zr_gsch_SWE_dezember_ges)#s

print(ss_zr_cav_SWE_januar_ges) #s
print(ss_zr_gruem_SWE_januar_ges) #ns
print(ss_zr_rob_SWE_januar_ges)#ns
print(ss_zr_lech_SWE_januar_ges)#NA
print(ss_zr_zuers_SWE_januar_ges)#NA
print(ss_zr_zug_SWE_januar_ges)#NA
print(ss_zr_trins_SWE_januar_ges)#ns
print(ss_zr_gsch_SWE_januar_ges)#ns

print(ss_zr_cav_SWE_februar_ges) #ns
print(ss_zr_gruem_SWE_februar_ges) #s
print(ss_zr_rob_SWE_februar_ges)#s
print(ss_zr_lech_SWE_februar_ges)#NA
print(ss_zr_zuers_SWE_februar_ges)#NA
print(ss_zr_zug_SWE_februar_ges)#NA
print(ss_zr_trins_SWE_februar_ges)#ns
print(ss_zr_gsch_SWE_februar_ges)#NA

ss_cav_in_SWE_november_ges_1 <- ss_cav_in_SWE_november_ges$estimates *31
ss_gruem_in_SWE_november_ges_1 <- ss_gruem_in_SWE_november_ges$estimates *31
ss_rob_in_SWE_november_ges_1 <- ss_rob_in_SWE_november_ges$estimates*31
ss_lech_in_SWE_november_ges_1 <- ss_lech_in_SWE_november_ges$estimates*31
ss_zuers_in_SWE_november_ges_1 <- ss_zuers_in_SWE_november_ges$estimates*31
ss_zug_in_SWE_november_ges_1 <- ss_zug_in_SWE_november_ges$estimates*31
ss_trins_in_SWE_november_ges_1 <- ss_trins_in_SWE_november_ges$estimates*31
ss_gsch_in_SWE_november_ges_1 <- ss_gsch_in_SWE_november_ges$estimates * 31

ss_cav_in_SWE_dezember_ges_1 <- ss_cav_in_SWE_dezember_ges$estimates*30
ss_gruem_in_SWE_dezember_ges_1 <- ss_gruem_in_SWE_dezember_ges$estimates*30
ss_rob_in_SWE_dezember_ges_1 <- ss_rob_in_SWE_dezember_ges$estimates*30
ss_lech_in_SWE_dezember_ges_1 <- ss_lech_in_SWE_dezember_ges$estimates*30
ss_zuers_in_SWE_dezember_ges_1 <- ss_zuers_in_SWE_dezember_ges$estimates*30
ss_zug_in_SWE_dezember_ges_1 <- ss_zug_in_SWE_dezember_ges$estimates*30
ss_trins_in_SWE_dezember_ges_1 <- ss_trins_in_SWE_dezember_ges$estimates*30
ss_gsch_in_SWE_dezember_ges_1 <- ss_gsch_in_SWE_dezember_ges$estimates*30

ss_cav_in_SWE_januar_ges_1 <- ss_cav_in_SWE_januar_ges$estimates*31
ss_gruem_in_SWE_januar_ges_1 <- ss_gruem_in_SWE_januar_ges$estimates*31
ss_rob_in_SWE_januar_ges_1 <- ss_rob_in_SWE_januar_ges$estimates*31
ss_lech_in_SWE_januar_ges_1 <- ss_lech_in_SWE_januar_ges$estimates*31
ss_zuers_in_SWE_januar_ges_1 <- ss_zuers_in_SWE_januar_ges$estimates*31
ss_zug_in_SWE_januar_ges_1 <- ss_zug_in_SWE_januar_ges$estimates*31
ss_trins_in_SWE_januar_ges_1 <- ss_trins_in_SWE_januar_ges$estimates*31
ss_gsch_in_SWE_januar_ges_1 <- ss_gsch_in_SWE_januar_ges$estimatess*31

ss_cav_in_SWE_februar_ges_1 <- ss_cav_in_SWE_februar_ges$estimates*28
ss_gruem_in_SWE_februar_ges_1 <- ss_gruem_in_SWE_februar_ges$estimates*28
ss_rob_in_SWE_februar_ges_1 <- ss_rob_in_SWE_februar_ges$estimates*28
ss_lech_in_SWE_februar_ges_1 <- ss_lech_in_SWE_februar_ges$estimates*28
ss_zuers_in_SWE_februar_ges_1 <- ss_zuers_in_SWE_februar_ges$estimates*28
ss_zug_in_SWE_februar_ges_1 <- ss_zug_in_SWE_februar_ges$estimates *28
ss_trins_in_SWE_februar_ges_1 <- ss_trins_in_SWE_februar_ges$estimates*28
ss_gsch_in_SWE_februar_ges_1 <- ss_gsch_in_SWE_februar_ges$estimates*28

ss_cav_in_SWE_maerz_ges_1 <- ss_cav_in_SWE_maerz_ges$estimates*31
ss_gruem_in_SWE_maerz_ges_1 <- ss_gruem_in_SWE_maerz_ges$estimates*31
ss_rob_in_SWE_maerz_ges_1 <- ss_rob_in_SWE_maerz_ges$estimates*31
ss_lech_in_SWE_maerz_ges_1 <- ss_lech_in_SWE_maerz_ges$estimates*31
ss_zuers_in_SWE_maerz_ges_1 <- ss_zuers_in_SWE_maerz_ges$estimates*31
ss_zug_in_SWE_maerz_ges_1 <- ss_zug_in_SWE_maerz_ges$estimates*31
ss_trins_in_SWE_maerz_ges_1 <- ss_trins_in_SWE_maerz_ges$estimates*31
ss_gsch_in_SWE_maerz_ges_1 <- ss_gsch_in_SWE_maerz_ges$estimates*31

ss_cav_in_SWE_april_ges_1 <- ss_cav_in_SWE_april_ges$estimates*30
ss_gruem_in_SWE_april_ges_1 <- ss_gruem_in_SWE_april_ges$estimates*30
ss_rob_in_SWE_april_ges_1 <- ss_rob_in_SWE_april_ges$estimates*30
ss_lech_in_SWE_april_ges_1 <- ss_lech_in_SWE_april_ges$estimates*30
ss_zuers_in_SWE_april_ges_1 <- ss_zuers_in_SWE_april_ges$estimates*30
ss_zug_in_SWE_april_ges_1 <- ss_zug_in_SWE_april_ges$estimates*30
ss_trins_in_SWE_april_ges_1 <- ss_trins_in_SWE_april_ges$estimates*30
ss_gsch_in_SWE_april_ges_1 <- ss_gsch_in_SWE_april_ges$estimates*30

ss_cav_in_SWE_mai_ges_1<- ss_cav_in_SWE_mai_ges$estimates*31
ss_gruem_in_SWE_mai_ges_1 <- ss_gruem_in_SWE_mai_ges$estimates*31
ss_rob_in_SWE_mai_ges_1 <- ss_rob_in_SWE_mai_ges$estimates*31
ss_lech_in_SWE_mai_ges_1 <- ss_lech_in_SWE_mai_ges$estimates*31
ss_zuers_in_SWE_mai_ges_1 <- ss_zuers_in_SWE_mai_ges$estimates*31
ss_zug_in_SWE_mai_ges_1 <- ss_zug_in_SWE_mai_ges$estimates*31
ss_trins_in_SWE_mai_ges_1 <- ss_trins_in_SWE_mai_ges$estimates*31
ss_gsch_in_SWE_mai_ges_1 <- ss_gsch_in_SWE_mai_ges$estimates*31

print(ss_zr_cav_SWE_maerz_ges) #nicht sig
print(ss_zr_gruem_SWE_maerz_ges) #nicht sig
print(ss_zr_rob_SWE_maerz_ges)# sig
print(ss_zr_lech_SWE_maerz_ges)#ns
print(ss_zr_zuers_SWE_maerz_ges)#NA
print(ss_zr_zug_SWE_maerz_ges)#NA
print(ss_zr_trins_SWE_maerz_ges)#ns
print(ss_zr_gsch_SWE_maerz_ges)#ns


print(ss_zr_cav_SWE_april_ges)#ns
print(ss_zr_gruem_SWE_april_ges)#s
print(ss_zr_rob_SWE_april_ges)#s
print(ss_zr_lech_SWE_april_ges)#ns
print(ss_zr_zuers_SWE_april_ges)#ns
print(ss_zr_zug_SWE_april_ges)#ns
print(ss_zr_trins_SWE_april_ges)#s
print(ss_zr_gsch_SWE_april_ges)#ns


print(ss_zr_cav_SWE_mai_ges)#ns
print(ss_zr_gruem_SWE_mai_ges)#ns
print(ss_zr_rob_SWE_mai_ges)#ns
print(ss_zr_lech_SWE_mai_ges)#ns
print(ss_zr_zuers_SWE_mai_ges)#s
print(ss_zr_zug_SWE_mai_ges)#ns
print(ss_zr_trins_SWE_mai_ges)#s
print(ss_zr_gsch_SWE_mai_ges)#ns

print(ss_zr_cav_SWE_november_sub) #ns
print(ss_zr_gruem_SWE_november_sub) #ns
print(ss_zr_rob_SWE_november_sub)#ns
print(ss_zr_lech_SWE_november_sub)#ns
print(ss_zr_zuers_SWE_november_sub)#ns
print(ss_zr_zug_SWE_november_sub)#ns
print(ss_zr_trins_SWE_november_sub)#ns
print(ss_zr_gsch_SWE_november_sub)#ns

print(ss_zr_cav_SWE_dezember_sub) #ns
print(ss_zr_gruem_SWE_dezember_sub) #ns
print(ss_zr_rob_SWE_dezember_sub)#ns
print(ss_zr_lech_SWE_dezember_sub)#ns
print(ss_zr_zuers_SWE_dezember_sub)#ns
print(ss_zr_zug_SWE_dezember_sub)#ns
print(ss_zr_trins_SWE_dezember_sub)#ns
print(ss_zr_gsch_SWE_dezember_sub)#s

print(ss_zr_cav_SWE_januar_sub) #ns
print(ss_zr_gruem_SWE_januar_sub) #ns
print(ss_zr_rob_SWE_januar_sub)#s
print(ss_zr_lech_SWE_januar_sub)#NA
print(ss_zr_zuers_SWE_januar_sub)#NA
print(ss_zr_zug_SWE_januar_sub)#NA
print(ss_zr_trins_SWE_januar_sub)#ns
print(ss_zr_gsch_SWE_januar_sub)#ns

print(ss_zr_cav_SWE_februar_sub) #ns
print(ss_zr_gruem_SWE_februar_sub) #ns
print(ss_zr_rob_SWE_februar_sub)#ns
print(ss_zr_lech_SWE_februar_sub)#NA
print(ss_zr_zuers_SWE_februar_sub)#NA
print(ss_zr_zug_SWE_februar_sub)#NA
print(ss_zr_trins_SWE_februar_sub)#ns
print(ss_zr_gsch_SWE_februar_sub)#NA


print(ss_zr_cav_SWE_maerz_sub)#ns
print(ss_zr_gruem_SWE_maerz_sub)#ns
print(ss_zr_rob_SWE_maerz_sub)#ns
print(ss_zr_lech_SWE_maerz_sub)#NA
print(ss_zr_zuers_SWE_maerz_sub)#ns
print(ss_zr_zug_SWE_maerz_sub)#NA
print(ss_zr_trins_SWE_maerz_sub)#ns
print(ss_zr_gsch_SWE_maerz_sub)#ns


print(ss_zr_cav_SWE_april_sub)#ns
print(ss_zr_gruem_SWE_april_sub)#ns
print(ss_zr_rob_SWE_april_sub)#ns
print(ss_zr_lech_SWE_april_sub)#ns
print(ss_zr_zuers_SWE_april_sub)#ns
print(ss_zr_zug_SWE_april_sub)#ns
print(ss_zr_trins_SWE_april_sub)#s
print(ss_zr_gsch_SWE_april_sub)#ns


print(ss_zr_cav_SWE_mai_sub)#ns
print(ss_zr_gruem_SWE_mai_sub)#s
print(ss_zr_lech_SWE_mai_sub)#ns
print(ss_zr_zuers_SWE_mai_sub)#ns
print(ss_zr_zug_SWE_mai_sub)#ns
print(ss_zr_trins_SWE_mai_sub)#ns
print(ss_zr_gsch_SWE_mai_sub)#ns

ss_cav_in_SWE_november_sub_1 <- ss_cav_in_SWE_november_sub$estimates *31
ss_gruem_in_SWE_november_sub_1 <- ss_gruem_in_SWE_november_sub$estimates *31
ss_rob_in_SWE_november_sub_1 <- ss_rob_in_SWE_november_sub$estimates*31
ss_lech_in_SWE_november_sub_1 <- ss_lech_in_SWE_november_sub$estimates*31
ss_zuers_in_SWE_november_sub_1 <- ss_zuers_in_SWE_november_sub$estimates*31
ss_zug_in_SWE_november_sub_1 <- ss_zug_in_SWE_november_sub$estimates*31
ss_trins_in_SWE_november_sub_1 <- ss_trins_in_SWE_november_sub$estimates*31
ss_gsch_in_SWE_november_sub_1 <- ss_gsch_in_SWE_november_sub$estimates * 31

ss_cav_in_SWE_dezember_sub_1 <- ss_cav_in_SWE_dezember_sub$estimates*30
ss_gruem_in_SWE_dezember_sub_1 <- ss_gruem_in_SWE_dezember_sub$estimates*30
ss_rob_in_SWE_dezember_sub_1 <- ss_rob_in_SWE_dezember_sub$estimates*30
ss_lech_in_SWE_dezember_sub_1 <- ss_lech_in_SWE_dezember_sub$estimates*30
ss_zuers_in_SWE_dezember_sub_1 <- ss_zuers_in_SWE_dezember_sub$estimates*30
ss_zug_in_SWE_dezember_sub_1 <- ss_zug_in_SWE_dezember_sub$estimates*30
ss_trins_in_SWE_dezember_sub_1 <- ss_trins_in_SWE_dezember_sub$estimates*30
ss_gsch_in_SWE_dezember_sub_1 <- ss_gsch_in_SWE_dezember_sub$estimates*30

ss_cav_in_SWE_januar_sub_1 <- ss_cav_in_SWE_januar_sub$estimates*31
ss_gruem_in_SWE_januar_sub_1 <- ss_gruem_in_SWE_januar_sub$estimates*31
ss_rob_in_SWE_januar_sub_1 <- ss_rob_in_SWE_januar_sub$estimates*31
ss_lech_in_SWE_januar_sub_1 <- ss_lech_in_SWE_januar_sub$estimates*31
ss_zuers_in_SWE_januar_sub_1 <- ss_zuers_in_SWE_januar_sub$estimates*31
ss_zug_in_SWE_januar_sub_1 <- ss_zug_in_SWE_januar_sub$estimates*31
ss_trins_in_SWE_januar_sub_1 <- ss_trins_in_SWE_januar_sub$estimates*31
ss_gsch_in_SWE_januar_sub_1 <- ss_gsch_in_SWE_januar_sub$estimates*31

ss_cav_in_SWE_februar_sub_1 <- ss_cav_in_SWE_februar_sub$estimates*28
ss_gruem_in_SWE_februar_sub_1 <- ss_gruem_in_SWE_februar_sub$estimates*28
ss_rob_in_SWE_februar_sub_1 <- ss_rob_in_SWE_februar_sub$estimates*28
ss_lech_in_SWE_februar_sub_1 <- ss_lech_in_SWE_februar_sub$estimates*28
ss_zuers_in_SWE_februar_sub_1 <- ss_zuers_in_SWE_februar_sub$estimates*28
ss_zug_in_SWE_februar_sub_1 <- ss_zug_in_SWE_februar_sub$estimates *28
ss_trins_in_SWE_februar_sub_1 <- ss_trins_in_SWE_februar_sub$estimates*28
ss_gsch_in_SWE_februar_sub_1 <- ss_gsch_in_SWE_februar_sub$estimates*28

ss_cav_in_SWE_maerz_sub_1 <- ss_cav_in_SWE_maerz_sub$estimates*31
ss_gruem_in_SWE_maerz_sub_1 <- ss_gruem_in_SWE_maerz_sub$estimates*31
ss_rob_in_SWE_maerz_sub_1 <- ss_rob_in_SWE_maerz_sub$estimates*31
ss_lech_in_SWE_maerz_sub_1 <- ss_lech_in_SWE_maerz_sub$estimates*31
ss_zuers_in_SWE_maerz_sub_1 <- ss_zuers_in_SWE_maerz_sub$estimates*31
ss_zug_in_SWE_maerz_sub_1 <- ss_zug_in_SWE_maerz_sub$estimates*31
ss_trins_in_SWE_maerz_sub_1 <- ss_trins_in_SWE_maerz_sub$estimates*31
ss_gsch_in_SWE_maerz_sub_1 <- ss_gsch_in_SWE_maerz_sub$estimates*31

ss_cav_in_SWE_april_sub_1 <- ss_cav_in_SWE_april_sub$estimates*30
ss_gruem_in_SWE_april_sub_1 <- ss_gruem_in_SWE_april_sub$estimates*30
ss_rob_in_SWE_april_sub_1 <- ss_rob_in_SWE_april_sub$estimates*30
ss_lech_in_SWE_april_sub_1 <- ss_lech_in_SWE_april_sub$estimates*30
ss_zuers_in_SWE_april_sub_1 <- ss_zuers_in_SWE_april_sub$estimates*30
ss_zug_in_SWE_april_sub_1 <- ss_zug_in_SWE_april_sub$estimates*30
ss_trins_in_SWE_april_sub_1 <- ss_trins_in_SWE_april_sub$estimates*30
ss_gsch_in_SWE_april_sub_1 <- ss_gsch_in_SWE_april_sub$estimates*30

ss_cav_in_SWE_mai_sub_1<- ss_cav_in_SWE_mai_sub$estimates*31
ss_gruem_in_SWE_mai_sub_1 <- ss_gruem_in_SWE_mai_sub$estimates*31
ss_lech_in_SWE_mai_sub_1 <- ss_lech_in_SWE_mai_sub$estimates*31
ss_zuers_in_SWE_mai_sub_1 <- ss_zuers_in_SWE_mai_sub$estimates*31
ss_zug_in_SWE_mai_sub_1 <- ss_zug_in_SWE_mai_sub$estimates*31
ss_trins_in_SWE_mai_sub_1 <- ss_trins_in_SWE_mai_sub$estimates*31
ss_gsch_in_SWE_mai_sub_1 <- ss_gsch_in_SWE_mai_sub$estimates*31



#Tabellen 

library(dplyr)
library(terra)

in_SWE_table_monatlich <- data.frame(Fluss = c("Cavaglia","Alp GrÃ¼m", "Robbia", "Lech", "Zuers", "Zug", "Trins","Gschnitz"),
                                 
November = c(ss_cav_in_SWE_november_ges_1 %>% round(3), ss_gruem_in_SWE_november_ges_1 %>% round(3), ss_rob_in_SWE_november_ges_1 %>% round(3), ss_lech_in_SWE_november_ges_1 %>% round(3), ss_zuers_in_SWE_november_ges_1 %>% round(3), NA, NA, NA),

Dezember = c(ss_cav_in_SWE_dezember_ges_1 %>% round(3), ss_gruem_in_SWE_dezember_ges_1 %>% round(3), NA, ss_lech_in_SWE_dezember_ges_1 %>% round(3), ss_zuers_in_SWE_dezember_ges_1 %>% round(3), NA, ss_trins_in_SWE_dezember_ges_1 %>% round(3), NA),

Januar = c(ss_cav_in_SWE_januar_ges_1 %>% round(3), ss_gruem_in_SWE_januar_ges_1 %>% round(3), ss_rob_in_SWE_januar_ges_1 %>% round(3), NA, ss_zuers_in_SWE_januar_ges_1 %>% round(3), ss_zug_in_SWE_januar_ges_1 %>% round(3), ss_trins_in_SWE_januar_ges_1 %>% round(3), NA),

Februar = c(ss_cav_in_SWE_februar_ges_1 %>% round(3), ss_gruem_in_SWE_februar_ges_1 %>% round(3), ss_rob_in_SWE_februar_ges_1 %>% round(3), NA, ss_zuers_in_SWE_februar_ges_1 %>% round(3), ss_zug_in_SWE_februar_ges_1 %>% round(3), ss_trins_in_SWE_februar_ges_1 %>% round(3), ss_gsch_in_SWE_februar_ges_1 %>% round(3)),
                            
Maerz = c(ss_cav_in_SWE_maerz_ges_1 %>% round(3), ss_gruem_in_SWE_maerz_ges_1 %>% round(3), ss_rob_in_SWE_maerz_ges_1 %>% round(3), NA, ss_zuers_in_SWE_maerz_ges_1 %>% round(3), ss_zug_in_SWE_maerz_ges_1 %>% round(3), NA, ss_gsch_in_SWE_maerz_ges_1 %>% round(3)),
                            
April = c(ss_cav_in_SWE_april_ges_1 %>% round(3), ss_gruem_in_SWE_april_ges_1 %>% round(3), ss_rob_in_SWE_april_ges_1 %>% round(3), NA, ss_zuers_in_SWE_april_ges_1 %>% round(3), ss_zug_in_SWE_april_ges_1 %>% round(3), ss_trins_in_SWE_april_ges_1 %>% round(3), NA),

Mai = c(ss_cav_in_SWE_mai_ges_1 %>% round(3), NA, NA, ss_lech_in_SWE_mai_ges_1 %>% round(3), ss_zuers_in_SWE_mai_ges_1 %>% round(3), ss_zug_in_SWE_mai_ges_1 %>% round(3), NA, NA), 

Juni = c(NA, NA, NA, NA, NA, NA, NA, NA),

November_sub = c(NA, ss_gruem_in_SWE_november_sub_1 %>% round(3), NA, ss_lech_in_SWE_november_sub_1 %>% round(3), ss_zuers_in_SWE_november_sub_1 %>% round(3), NA,  NA, NA),

Dezember_sub = c(ss_cav_in_SWE_dezember_sub_1 %>% round(3), NA, ss_rob_in_SWE_dezember_sub_1 %>% round(3), NA, ss_zuers_in_SWE_dezember_sub_1 %>% round(3), NA, NA, NA),

Januar_sub = c(ss_cav_in_SWE_januar_sub_1 %>% round(3), NA, NA, ss_lech_in_SWE_januar_sub_1 %>% round(3), NA, ss_zug_in_SWE_januar_sub_1 %>% round(3), NA, NA),

Februar_sub = c(ss_cav_in_SWE_februar_sub_1 %>% round(3), ss_gruem_in_SWE_februar_sub_1 %>% round(3), ss_rob_in_SWE_februar_sub_1 %>% round(3), ss_lech_in_SWE_februar_sub_1 %>% round(3), ss_zuers_in_SWE_februar_sub_1 %>% round(3), ss_zug_in_SWE_februar_sub_1 %>% round(3), ss_trins_in_SWE_februar_sub_1 %>% round(3), ss_gsch_in_SWE_februar_sub_1 %>% round(3)),

Maerz_sub = c(ss_cav_in_SWE_maerz_sub_1 %>% round(3), NA, NA, ss_lech_in_SWE_maerz_sub_1 %>% round(3), NA, ss_zug_in_SWE_maerz_sub_1 %>% round(3), NA, ss_gsch_in_SWE_maerz_sub_1 %>% round(3)),
                            
April_sub = c(ss_cav_in_SWE_april_sub_1 %>% round(3), ss_gruem_in_SWE_april_sub_1 %>% round(3), NA, ss_lech_in_SWE_april_sub_1 %>% round(3), ss_zuers_in_SWE_april_sub_1 %>% round(3), ss_zug_in_SWE_april_sub_1 %>% round(3), NA, NA),

Mai_sub = c(ss_cav_in_SWE_mai_sub_1 %>% round(3), ss_gruem_in_SWE_mai_sub_1 %>% round(3), NA, ss_lech_in_SWE_mai_sub_1 %>% round(3), ss_zuers_in_SWE_mai_sub_1 %>% round(3), ss_zug_in_SWE_mai_sub_1 %>% round(3), NA, NA), 

Juni_sub = c(NA, NA, NA, NA, NA, NA, NA, NA))

library(gt)

in_SWE_table_monatlich <- gt(in_SWE_table_monatlich) |>
  tab_header(title = "Sen's Slope SchÃ¤tzer der IntesitÃ¤t fÃ¼r das SWE fÃ¼r den gesamten Beobachtungszeitraum und im Vergleichszeitraum in der monatliche Betrachtung")|> 
  cols_label(Fluss = "Station", November ="Nov.", Dezember = "Dez.", Januar = "Jan.", Februar = "Feb.",  Maerz = "MÃ¤r.", April = "Apr.", Mai = "Mai", Juni = "Jun.", November_sub = "Nov_sub", Dezember_sub = "Dez_sub", Januar_sub = "Jan_sub", Februar_sub = "Feb_sub", Maerz_sub = "MÃ¤r_sub", April_sub = "Apr_sub", Mai_sub = "Mai_sub", Juni_sub = "Jun_sub")|>
tab_options(
    table.font.size = px(10)
)

gtsave(in_SWE_table_monatlich,
  "C:/Users/maggi/OneDrive/Studium/7_Semster/BA/Dat/Plots/in_SWE_table_monatlich.png"
)

zr_SWE_table_monatlich <- data.frame(Fluss = c("Cavaglia","Alp GrÃ¼m", "Robbia", "Lech", "Zuers", "Zug", "Trins","Gschnitz"),
                                 
November = c(ss_zr_cav_SWE_november_ges$estimates, ss_zr_gruem_SWE_november_ges$estimates, ss_zr_rob_SWE_november_ges$estimates, NA, NA, NA, NA, NA),

Dezember = c(NA, ss_zr_gruem_SWE_dezember_ges$estimates, ss_zr_rob_SWE_dezember_ges$estimates, ss_zr_lech_SWE_dezember_ges$estimates, NA, NA, NA, ss_zr_gsch_SWE_dezember_ges$estimates),

Januar = c(ss_zr_cav_SWE_januar_ges$estimates, NA, NA, NA, NA, NA, NA, NA),

Februar = c(NA, ss_zr_gruem_SWE_februar_ges$estimates, ss_zr_rob_SWE_februar_ges$estimates, NA, NA, NA, NA, NA),
                            
Maerz = c(NA, NA, ss_zr_rob_maerz_ges$estimates, NA, NA, NA, NA, NA),
                            
April = c(NA, ss_zr_gruem_SWE_april_ges$estimates, ss_zr_rob_SWE_april_ges$estimates, NA, NA, NA, ss_zr_trins_SWE_april_ges$estimates, NA),

Mai = c(NA, NA, NA, NA, ss_zr_zuers_SWE_mai_ges$estimates, NA, ss_zr_trins_SWE_mai_ges$estimates, NA), 

Juni = c(NA, NA, NA, NA, NA, NA, NA, NA),

November_sub = c(NA, NA, NA, NA, NA, NA, NA, NA),

Dezember_sub = c(NA, NA, NA, NA, NA, NA, NA, ss_zr_gsch_SWE_dezember_sub$estimates),

Januar_sub = c(NA, NA, ss_zr_rob_SWE_januar_sub$estimates, NA, NA, NA, NA, NA),

Februar_sub = c(NA, NA, NA, NA, NA, NA, NA, NA),

Maerz_sub = c(NA, NA, NA, NA, NA, NA, NA, NA),
                            
April_sub = c(NA, NA, NA, NA, NA, NA, ss_zr_trins_april_sub$estimates, NA),

Mai_sub = c(NA, ss_zr_gruem_SWE_mai_sub$estimates, NA, NA, NA, NA, NA, NA), 

Juni_sub = c(NA, NA, NA, NA, NA, NA, NA, NA))

library(gt)

gt(zr_SWE_table_monatlich) |>
  tab_header(title = "Sen Slope SchÃ¤tzer den Nullwert des SWEs fÃ¼r den gesamten Beobachtungszeitraum und den Subsetzeitraum in der monatliche Betrachtung")|> 
  cols_label(Fluss = "Station", November ="November", Dezember = "Dezember", Januar = "Januar", Februar = "Februar",  Maerz = "MÃ¤rz", April = "April", Mai = "Mai", Juni = "Juni", November_sub = "November_sub", Dezember_sub = "Dezember_sub", Januar_sub = "Januar_sub", Februar_sub = "Februar_sub", Maerz_sub = "MÃ¤rz_sub", April_sub = "April_sub", Mai_sub = "Mai_sub", Juni_sub = "Juni_sub")

#plot IntensitÃ¤t des SWE fÃ¼r die einzelnen Monate

library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
november_zuers_ges <- november_zuers_ges %>%
  mutate(
    Jahr = year(date),
    Tag = yday(date)
  )

y_wert <- median(november_zuers_ges$SWE, na.rm = TRUE) -
             ss_zuers_in_SWE_november_ges * median(november_zuers_ges$Tag, na.rm = TRUE)

ggplot(november_zuers_ges,
       aes(x = Tag, y = SWE, group = Jahr)) +
  geom_line(colour = "grey") +  geom_abline(
    slope = ss_zuers_in_SWE_november_ges,
    intercept = y_wert,
    colour = "red",
    linewidth = 1.2
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "SWE im November in ZÃ¼rs",
    x = "Tag des Jahres",
    y = "SWE in mm",
    color = "Jahr"
  ) +
  annotate(
  "text",
  x = 150,
  y = max(zuers_in_SWE_november_ges$SWE, na.rm = TRUE),
  label = paste0(
    "Trend im November pro Jahr",
    round(zuers_in_SWE_november_ges_1, 3),
    " mm"
  )
) + 
  
  theme_minimal()



```

```{r Graphische monatliche Darstellung der Korrrelation }


cor_table_monatlich <- data.frame(Fluss = c("Cavaglia","Alp GrÃ¼m", "Robbia", "Lech", "Zuers", "Zug", "Trins","Gschnitz"),
                                 
November = c(cor_spear_cavaglia_november_ges, cor_spear_gruem_november_ges, cor_spear_robbia_november_ges, cor_spear_lech_november_ges, cor_spear_zuers_november_ges , cor_spear_zug_november_ges , cor_spear_trins_november_ges, cor_spear_gsch_november_ges),

Dezember = c(cor_spear_cavaglia_dezember_ges, cor_spear_gruem_dezember_ges, cor_spear_robbia_dezember_ges, cor_spear_lech_dezember_ges, cor_spear_zuers_dezember_ges, cor_spear_zug_dezember_ges, cor_spear_trins_dezember_ges, cor_spear_gsch_dezember_ges),

Januar = c(cor_spear_cavaglia_januar_ges, cor_spear_gruem_januar_ges, cor_spear_robbia_januar_ges, cor_spear_lech_januar_ges, cor_spear_zuers_januar_ges, cor_spear_zug_januar_ges, cor_spear_trins_januar_ges, cor_spear_gsch_januar_ges),

Februar = c(cor_spear_cavaglia_februar_ges, cor_spear_gruem_februar_ges, cor_spear_robbia_februar_ges, cor_spear_lech_februar_ges, cor_spear_zuers_februar_ges, cor_spear_zug_februar_ges, cor_spear_trins_februar_ges, cor_spear_gsch_februar_ges),
                            
Maerz = c(cor_spear_cavaglia_maerz_ges, cor_spear_gruem_maerz_ges, cor_spear_robbia_maerz_ges, cor_spear_lech_maerz_ges, cor_spear_zuers_maerz_ges, cor_spear_zug_maerz_ges, cor_spear_trins_maerz_ges, cor_spear_gsch_maerz_ges),
                            
April = c(cor_spear_cavaglia_april_ges, cor_spear_gruem_april_ges, cor_spear_robbia_april_ges, cor_spear_lech_april_ges, cor_spear_zuers_april_ges, cor_spear_zug_april_ges, cor_spear_trins_april_ges, cor_spear_gsch_april_ges),

Mai = c(cor_spear_cavaglia_mai_ges, cor_spear_gruem_mai_ges, cor_spear_robbia_mai_ges, cor_spear_lech_mai_ges, cor_spear_zuers_mai_ges, cor_spear_zug_mai_ges, cor_spear_trins_mai_ges, cor_spear_gsch_mai_ges), 

Juni = c(cor_spear_cavaglia_juni_ges, cor_spear_gruem_juni_ges, cor_spear_robbia_juni_ges, cor_spear_lech_juni_ges, cor_spear_zuers_juni_ges, cor_spear_zug_juni_ges, cor_spear_trins_juni_ges, cor_spear_gsch_juni_ges),

November_sub = c(cor_spear_cavaglia_november_sub, cor_spear_gruem_november_sub, cor_spear_robbia_november_sub, cor_spear_lech_november_sub, cor_spear_zuers_november_sub, cor_spear_zug_november_sub, cor_spear_trins_november_sub, cor_spear_gsch_november_sub),

Dezember_sub = c(cor_spear_cavaglia_dezember_sub, cor_spear_gruem_dezember_sub, cor_spear_robbia_dezember_sub, cor_spear_lech_dezember_sub, cor_spear_zuers_dezember_sub, cor_spear_zug_dezember_sub, cor_spear_trins_dezember_sub, cor_spear_gsch_dezember_sub),

Januar_sub = c(cor_spear_cavaglia_januar_sub, cor_spear_gruem_januar_sub, cor_spear_robbia_januar_sub, cor_spear_lech_januar_sub, cor_spear_zuers_januar_sub, cor_spear_zug_januar_sub, cor_spear_trins_januar_sub, cor_spear_gsch_januar_sub),

Februar_sub = c(cor_spear_cavaglia_februar_sub, cor_spear_gruem_februar_sub, cor_spear_robbia_februar_sub, cor_spear_lech_februar_sub, cor_spear_zuers_februar_sub, cor_spear_zug_februar_sub, cor_spear_trins_februar_sub, cor_spear_gsch_februar_sub),

Maerz_sub = c(cor_spear_cavaglia_maerz_sub, cor_spear_gruem_maerz_sub, cor_spear_robbia_maerz_sub, cor_spear_lech_maerz_sub, cor_spear_zuers_maerz_sub, cor_spear_zug_maerz_sub, cor_spear_trins_maerz_sub, cor_spear_gsch_maerz_sub),
                            
April_sub = c(cor_spear_cavaglia_april_sub, cor_spear_gruem_april_sub, cor_spear_robbia_april_sub, cor_spear_lech_april_sub, cor_spear_zuers_april_sub, cor_spear_zug_april_sub, cor_spear_trins_april_sub, cor_spear_gsch_april_sub),

Mai_sub = c(cor_spear_cavaglia_mai_sub, cor_spear_gruem_mai_sub, cor_spear_robbia_mai_sub, cor_spear_lech_mai_sub, cor_spear_zuers_mai_sub, cor_spear_zug_mai_sub, cor_spear_trins_mai_sub, cor_spear_gsch_mai_sub), 

Juni_sub = c(cor_spear_cavaglia_juni_sub, cor_spear_gruem_juni_sub, cor_spear_robbia_juni_sub, cor_spear_lech_juni_sub, cor_spear_zuers_juni_sub, cor_spear_zug_juni_sub, cor_spear_trins_juni_sub, cor_spear_gsch_juni_sub))


library(gt)

cor_table_monatlich <- gt(cor_table_monatlich) |>
  tab_header(title = "Korrelation zwischen SWE und den Abfluss fÃ¼r den gesamten Beobachtungszeitraum und den Subsetzeitraum in der monatliche Betrachtung")|> 
  cols_label(Fluss = "Station", November ="November", Dezember = "Dezember", Januar = "Januar", Februar = "Februar",  Maerz = "MÃ¤rz", April = "April", Mai = "Mai", Juni = "Juni", November_sub = "Nov._sub", Dezember_sub = "Dez._sub", Januar_sub = "Jan._sub", Februar_sub = "Feb._sub", Maerz_sub = "MÃ¤r._sub", April_sub = "Apr._sub", Mai_sub = "Mai_sub", Juni_sub = "Jun._sub")|>
tab_options(
    table.font.size = px(10)
)


gtsave(cor_table_monatlich,
  "C:/Users/maggi/OneDrive/Studium/7_Semster/BA/Dat/Plots/cor_table_monatlich.png"
)
```

```{r Graphische Darstellung des Pettitt Test}

pettitt_table_snow <- data.frame(Fluss = c("Cavaglia","Alp GrÃ¼m", "Robbia", "Lech", "Zuers", "Zug", "Trins","Gschnitz"),
                                 
HS = c(datacavaglia$date[change_point_hs_cavaglia], datagruem$date[change_point_hs_gruem], datarobbia$date[change_point_hs_robbia], datalech$date[change_point_hs_lech], datazuers$date[change_point_hs_zuers], datazug$date[change_point_hs_zug], datatrins$date[change_point_hs_trins], datagschnitz$date[change_point_hs_gschnitz]),

SWE = c(datacavaglia$date[change_point_SWE_cavaglia], datagruem$date[change_point_SWE_gruem], datarobbia$date[change_point_SWE_robbia], datalech$date[change_point_SWE_lech], datazuers$date[change_point_SWE_zuers], datazug$date[change_point_SWE_zug], datatrins$date[change_point_SWE_trins], datagschnitz$date[change_point_SWE_gsch]))

pettitt_table_Q <- data.frame(Fluss = c("Poschiavino","Lech", "Gschnitzbach"),
                                 
Q = c(dataQleprese$date[change_point_leprese], dataQLech$date[change_point_Lech], dataQGschnitzbach$date[change_point_Gschnitzbach]))


library(gt)

pettitt_table_snow <- gt(pettitt_table_snow) |>
  tab_header(title = "Pettitt-Test fÃ¼r die SchneehÃ¶he und das SWE")|> 
  cols_label(Fluss = "Station", HS ="SchneehÃ¶he", SWE = "SWE")

pettitt_table_Q <- gt(pettitt_table_Q) |>
  tab_header(title = "Pettitt-Test fÃ¼r die AbflÃ¼sse")|> 
  cols_label(Fluss = "Station", Q ="Abfluss")

gtsave(pettitt_table_snow,
  "C:/Users/maggi/OneDrive/Studium/7_Semster/BA/Dat/Plots/pettitt_table_snow.png"
)
gtsave(pettitt_table_Q,
  "C:/Users/maggi/OneDrive/Studium/7_Semster/BA/Dat/Plots/pettitt_table_Q.png"
)


```

```{r Graphische Darstellung der Korrelation fÃ¼r Jahr FrÃ¼hling und Winter fÃ¼r den gesamten Zeitraum mund den subset}

#Tabelle

cor_SWE_Q_table <- data.frame(Fluss = c("Cavaglia","Alp GrÃ¼m", "Robbia", "Lech", "Zuers", "Zug", "Trins","Gschnitz"),
                                 
Jahr = c(cor_spear_cav_ges, cor_spear_gruem_ges, cor_spear_robbia_ges, cor_spear_lech_ges, cor_spear_zuers_ges, cor_spear_zug_ges, cor_spear_trins_ges, cor_spear_gsch_ges),

Fruehling = c(cor_spear_cavaglia_s_ges, cor_spear_gruem_s_ges, cor_spear_robbia_s_ges, cor_spear_lech_s_ges, cor_spear_zuers_s_ges, cor_spear_zug_s_ges, cor_spear_trins_s_ges, cor_spear_gsch_s_ges),

Winter = c(cor_spear_cavaglia_w_ges, cor_spear_gruem_w_ges, cor_spear_robbia_w_ges, cor_spear_lech_w_ges, cor_spear_zuers_w_ges, cor_spear_zug_w_ges, cor_spear_trins_w_ges, cor_spear_gsch_w_ges),

Jahr_sub = c(cor_spear_cav_sub, cor_spear_gruem_sub, cor_spear_rob_sub, cor_spear_lech_sub, cor_spear_zuers_sub, cor_spear_zug_sub, cor_spear_trins_sub, cor_spear_gsch_sub),
                            
Fruehling_sub = c(cor_spear_cavaglia_s_sub, cor_spear_gruem_s_sub, cor_spear_robbia_s_sub, cor_spear_lech_s_sub, cor_spear_zuers_s_sub, cor_spear_zug_s_sub, cor_spear_trins_s_sub, cor_spear_gsch_s_sub),
                            
Winter_sub = c(cor_spear_cavaglia_w_sub, cor_spear_gruem_w_sub, cor_spear_robbia_w_sub, cor_spear_lech_w_sub, cor_spear_zuers_w_sub, cor_spear_zug_w_sub, cor_spear_trins_w_sub, cor_spear_gsch_w_sub))

library(gt)

cor_SWE_Q_table <- gt(cor_SWE_Q_table) |>
  tab_header(title = "Korrelation zwischen dem SWE und dem Abfluss im gesamten Zeitraum und dem Subsetzeitraum")|> 
  cols_label(Fluss = "Station", Jahr ="Jahr", Fruehling = "FrÃ¼hling", Winter = "Winter", Jahr_sub = "Jahr_sub",  Fruehling_sub = "FrÃ¼hling_sub", Winter_sub = "Winter_sub")


gtsave(cor_SWE_Q_table,
  "C:/Users/maggi/OneDrive/Studium/7_Semster/BA/Dat/Plots/cor_SWE_Q_table.png"
)




```

```{r Tabellarische Darstellung vom Sen slope  des Abflusses fÃ¼r den subset Zeitraum und den Gesamtzeitraum fÃ¼r Jahr FrÃ¼hling, Winter}

library(dplyr)

print(sen_Q_leprese)#ns
print(sen_Q_Lech)#s
print(sen_Q_Gschnitzbach)#s
print(sen_Q_leprese_s_ges)#ns
print(sen_Q_Lech_s_ges)#s
print(sen_Q_Gschnitzbach_s_ges)#s
print(sen_Q_leprese_w_ges)#s
print(sen_Q_Lech_w_ges)#s
print(sen_Qleprese_sub)#ns
print(sen_Qlech_sub)#s
print(sen_Qgsch_sub)#ns
print(sen_Qleprese_s_sub)#s
print(sen_Qlech_s_sub)#s
print(sen_Qgsch_s_sub)#s
print(sen_Qleprese_w_sub)#s
print(sen_Qlech_w_sub)#s
print(sen_Qgsch_w_sub) #s

sen_Q_Lech_t <- sen_Q_Lech$estimates *365 
sen_Q_Gschnitzbach_t <- sen_Q_Gschnitzbach$estimates * 365 
sen_Q_Lech_s_ges_t <- sen_Q_Lech_s_ges$estimates * 122 
sen_Q_Gschnitzbach_s_ges_t <- sen_Q_Gschnitzbach_s_ges$estimates * 122
sen_Q_leprese_w_ges_t <- sen_Q_leprese_w_ges$estimates * 120 
sen_Q_Lech_w_ges_t <- sen_Q_Lech_w_ges$estimates * 120 
sen_Q_Gschnitzbach_w_ges_t <- sen_Q_Gschnitzbach_w_ges$estimates * 120 
sen_Qlech_sub_t <- sen_Qlech_sub$estimates * 365 
sen_Qleprese_s_sub_t <- sen_Qleprese_s_sub$estimates * 122 
sen_Qlech_s_sub_t <- sen_Qlech_s_sub$estimates * 122 
sen_Qgsch_s_sub_t <- sen_Qgsch_s_sub$estimates * 122
sen_Qleprese_w_sub_t <- sen_Qleprese_w_sub$estimates * 120
sen_Qlech_w_sub_t <- sen_Qlech_w_sub$estimates * 120 
sen_Qgsch_w_sub_t <- sen_Qgsch_w_sub$estimates * 120 

  #Tabelle



abfluss_table_ss <- data.frame(Fluss = c("Poschiavino","Lech", "Gschnitzbach"),
                            
SenSlope = c(NA, sen_Q_Lech_t %>% round(3), sen_Q_Gschnitzbach_t %>% round(3)),

SenSlope_s_ges = c(NA, sen_Q_Lech_s_ges_t %>% round(3), sen_Q_Gschnitzbach_s_ges_t %>% round(3)),

SenSlope_w_ges = c(sen_Q_leprese_w_ges_t %>% round(3), sen_Q_Lech_w_ges_t %>% round(3), sen_Q_Gschnitzbach_w_ges_t %>% round(3)),


SenSlope_sub = c(NA, sen_Qlech_sub_t%>% round(3), NA),

SenSlope_s_sub = c(sen_Qleprese_s_sub_t %>% round(3), sen_Qlech_s_sub_t %>% round(3), sen_Qgsch_s_sub_t %>% round(3)),

SenSlope_w_sub = c(sen_Qleprese_w_sub_t %>% round(3), sen_Qlech_w_sub_t %>% round(3), sen_Qgsch_w_sub_t %>% round(3)))



library(gt)

table_Q_ss <- gt(abfluss_table_ss) |>
  tab_header(title = "Sen's Slope SchÃ¤tzer des Abflusses im Gesamtzeitraum und im Vergleichszeitraum (1992 - 2022)")|> 
  cols_label(Fluss = "Fluss", SenSlope = "Jahr", SenSlope_s_ges = "FrÃ¼hling", SenSlope_w_ges = "Winter", SenSlope_sub = "Jahr_sub", SenSlope_s_sub = "FrÃ¼hling_sub", SenSlope_w_sub = "Winter_sub")

gtsave(table_Q_ss,
  "C:/Users/maggi/OneDrive/Studium/7_Semster/BA/Dat/Plots/table_Q_ss.png"
)
```

```{r Hypsometrische Kurve}

#Lech

library(terra)
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)

dem_lech <- rast("C:/Users/maggi/OneDrive/Studium/7_Semster/BA/Dat/QGIS_Arbeiten/EZG_Erstellung/EZG_Lech.tif")

elev_lech <- values(dem_lech)
elev_lech <- elev_lech[is.finite(elev_lech)]

area_m2 <- prod(res(dem_lech))
area_km2 <- area_m2 / 1e6


EZG_lech <- data.frame(elev_lech = elev_lech)

EZG_lech <- EZG_lech %>%
  arrange(desc(elev_lech))
  
EZG_lech <- EZG_lech %>%
  mutate(
    a_km2 = seq_along(elev_lech) * area_km2
  )

ggplot(EZG_lech, aes(x = a_km2, y = elev_lech)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1) +
  
  labs(
    title = "Hypsometrische Kurve am Pegel Lech TannenbergbrÃ¼cke",
    x = "Kumulative FlÃ¤che [kmÂ²]",
    y = "HÃ¶he [m]"
  ) +
  
  theme_minimal()

ggsave("C:/Users/maggi/OneDrive/Studium/7_Semster/BA/Dat/Plots/hypsometrische_kurve_lech.png",
       width = 8,
       height = 6,
       dpi = 300, bg = "white")

#Poschiavino

dem_posch <- rast("C:/Users/maggi/OneDrive/Studium/7_Semster/BA/Dat/QGIS_Arbeiten/EZG_Erstellung/EZG_Poschiavino.tif")

elev_posch <- values(dem_posch)
elev_posch <- elev_posch[is.finite(elev_posch)]

area_m2 <- prod(res(dem_posch))
area_km2 <- area_m2 / 1e6


EZG_posch <- data.frame(elev_posch = elev_posch)

EZG_posch <- EZG_posch %>%
  arrange(desc(elev_posch))
  
EZG_posch <- EZG_posch %>%
  mutate(
    a_km2 = seq_along(elev_posch) * area_km2
  )

ggplot(EZG_posch, aes(x = a_km2, y = elev_posch)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1) +
  
  labs(
    title = "Hypsometrische Kurve am Pegel Le Prese",
    x = "Kumulative FlÃ¤che [kmÂ²]",
    y = "HÃ¶he [m]"
  ) +
  
  theme_minimal()

ggsave("C:/Users/maggi/OneDrive/Studium/7_Semster/BA/Dat/Plots/hypsometrische_kurve_poschiavino.png",
       width = 8,
       height = 6,
       dpi = 300, bg = "white")

#Gschnitzbach

dem_gsch <- rast("C:/Users/maggi/OneDrive/Studium/7_Semster/BA/Dat/QGIS_Arbeiten/EZG_Erstellung/EZG_gschnitzbach.tif")

elev_gsch <- values(dem_gsch)
elev_gsch <- elev_gsch[is.finite(elev_gsch)]

area_m2 <- prod(res(dem_gsch))
area_km2 <- area_m2 / 1e6


EZG_gsch <- data.frame(elev_gsch = elev_gsch)

EZG_gsch <- EZG_gsch %>%
  arrange(desc(elev_gsch))
  
EZG_gsch <- EZG_gsch %>%
  mutate(
    a_km2 = seq_along(elev_gsch) * area_km2
  )

ggplot(EZG_gsch, aes(x = a_km2, y = elev_gsch)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1) +
  
  labs(
    title = "Hypsometrische Kurve am Pegel Steinach am Brenner",
    x = "Kumulative FlÃ¤che [kmÂ²]",
    y = "HÃ¶he [m]"
  ) +
  
  theme_minimal()

ggsave("C:/Users/maggi/OneDrive/Studium/7_Semster/BA/Dat/Plots/hypsometrische_kurve_gschnitzbach.png",
       width = 8,
       height = 6,
       dpi = 300, bg = "white")


```
